The ‚àí1 (honest): (a) my FIRST Phase-3E run crashed because I used the documented example-config format, not anticipating the appServer observer‚Äôs read.table strictness ‚Äî cost one extra AppDriver round-trip (though it productively surfaced #50; a faithful ‚Äúwhat does the observer do with a config file‚Äù pre-check would have predicted it); (b) the check-script error metric should have classified by log level from the start; (c) build-time gating freezes the decision at app construction (correct for a per-deployment config, but a deliberate trade-off worth naming).

‚áí SUGGESTED NEXT = owner‚Äôs pick. #49 is implemented, verified, and runtime-smoke-tested; #47 is CLOSED; nothing mid-flight. 18 open issues (NEW #50 filed; #47 closed ‚Üí net +0). Candidates: - (1) Fix #50 (config-observer crash) ‚Äî real and serious: the modular app crashes on boot for ANY deployment whose config file uses the documented format. Real TDD: RED = parse example_nprcgenekeepr_config through the observer‚Äôs path and assert no error / correct shared$config; GREEN = parse via getSiteInfo/getParamDef (single source of truth) or tryCatch+warn; Phase-3E = boot WITH a documented-format config present (use this session‚Äôs HOME-override app.R recipe). - (2) Durable opt-in E2E for the ORIP tab ‚Äî tests/testthat/test-e2e-orip-module.R mirroring test-e2e-potential-parents-module.R (S82): must set an ONPRC config (the tab is now ONPRC-gated) ‚Äî the E2E app.R can use the HOME-override recipe with a read.table-safe single-line config. Small TDD/test-only. - (3) Docfix sweep ‚Äî getPedDirectRelatives @examples bug (R/getPedDirectRelatives.R:27 calls getLkDirectRelatives, not itself; one-line roxygen RED‚ÜíGREEN) ¬± dedicated tests for kinshipMatrixToKValues/getAncestors. Small TDD. - (4) Housekeeping: CLAUDE.md + the appUI.R About tab (R/appUI.R:216) still say ‚ÄúVersion 1.0.8‚Äù vs DESCRIPTION 1.1.0.9000 (carried since S56). - (5) Push add-methodology to origin (now ahead by ~37 after this close-out; S51 promoted prior work via PR #41). Do NOT implement #28 (still gated on #11/#12/#37/#46), do NOT close #45/#50, and do NOT close #1, #5, #9, or any OPEN issue without firsthand owner-confirmed evidence.

Key files (this session): NEW (committed): R/shouldShowOripTab.R (exported pure predicate), tests/testthat/test_shouldShowOripTab.R (5 cases), man/shouldShowOripTab.Rd. CHANGED (code): R/appUI.R (added siteInfo param + showOrip + conditional ORIP tabPanel ~:165-172), R/appServer.R (gated modORIPReportingServer mount ~:284-296), tests/testthat/test_modORIPReporting.R (rewritten: 4 injected-siteInfo cases), NAMESPACE (export), man/appUI.Rd. CHANGED (docs): NEWS.Rmd‚ÜíNEWS.md (ORIP bullet ONPRC note), CHANGELOG.md (S84 entry), PROJECT_LEARNINGS.md (Learning 82), SESSION_NOTES.md (this handoff). GitHub: #47 CLOSED (owner-confirmed); NEW #50 OPEN (config-observer crash, enhancement). Read firsthand (unchanged): R/getSiteInfo.R (default center ‚ÄúONPRC‚Äù :66, requires all 7 params when file present), R/getConfigFileName.R (~/.nprcgenekeepr_config), R/shouldShowChangedColsTab.R (exported pure-predicate precedent), tests/testthat/test_appServer_dynamicTabs.R (the pure-predicate + appUI-grepl + deparse-grepl idiom), inst/extdata/example_nprcgenekeepr_config (center=SNPRC; documented multi-line format). Transient (NOT committed): /tmp/s84_orip_phase3e.R, /tmp/s84_orip_logcheck.R.

Gotchas: (1) The ORIP tab gate is BUILD-TIME ‚Äî decided when appUI()/appServer first run (per-deployment constant). Correct because the config is per-server, but it does NOT react to a mid-session config change. (2) appUI() now takes a siteInfo param (defaulted to getSiteInfo(expectConfigFile=FALSE)) ‚Äî tests inject it; production callers (runModularApp, inst/shinytest/app.R) call appUI() with no args (unchanged behavior). (3) Pre-existing bug #50: the appServer config observer‚Äôs read.table(sep="=") crashes the app on boot with a DOCUMENTED-format config file. For ANY app-boot-with-config test, use a stripped single-line key=value config (all 7 params: center, baseUrl, schemaName, folderPath, queryName, lkPedColumns, mapPedColumns ‚Äî multi-values SPACE-separated, no quotes/commas/comments) that both read.table and getParamDef accept. (4) Phase-3E HOME-override recipe: generate a temp app.R doing Sys.setenv(HOME=<temp dir with .nprcgenekeepr_config>) BEFORE shinyApp(appUI(), appServer), then AppDriver$new(<that dir>) (NOT_CRAN=true + install dev first). One AppDriver per config scenario. (5) Classify AppDriver logs by LEVEL/text, not namespace mention ‚Äî shiny:value <ns>-<output> lines are INFO registrations (success), not errors; genuine errors are error-level minus the pre-existing app-wide shinyBS is not defined noise. (6) object_usage_linter false-positives a brand-new package function (‚Äúno visible global function‚Äù) until devtools::install(); re-lint after install to confirm clean. (7) CLAUDE.md + appUI.R:216 still say ‚ÄúVersion 1.0.8‚Äù (DESCRIPTION 1.1.0.9000) ‚Äî stale since S56. (8) The 2 untracked files (..Rcheck/, PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html) + .DS_Store remain uncommitted (build-ignored / owner‚Äôs standing keep-call). (9) Default gh issue view errors on projectCards ‚Äî use gh issue view N --json <fields>. Branch model unchanged: this close-out is on add-methodology; master gets it on the next sync/PR (S51 promoted prior work via PR #41).

Gotchas: (1) #47 is implemented but stays OPEN pending owner-confirmed close (standing rule). (2) The ORIP tab ships ALWAYS-VISIBLE; the owner wants it ONPRC-gated ‚Üí tracked in NEW #49. Do NOT treat the always-visible v1 as the final intended behavior. (3) Phase-3E mount-smoke recipe (reusable): NOT_CRAN=true Rscript + devtools::install(quick=TRUE) first + AppDriver$new(system.file("shinytest", package="nprcgenekeepr")); navigate via app$set_inputs(mainNavbar="<Tab Title>"); grep logs for YOUR namespace (the shinyBS is not defined errors are pre-existing app-wide noise). SCRIPT GOTCHA: app$get_html(".tab-pane.active") returns MULTIPLE nodes (every nested module tabset has its own active pane) ‚Äî collapse with paste(collapse=" ") or assert app$get_value(input="mainNavbar"); a length-N vector into &&/isTRUE halts the run. (4) NEWS.md is GENERATED from NEWS.Rmd (github_document) ‚Äî edit the .Rmd SOURCE and rmarkdown::render("NEWS.Rmd", output_file="NEWS.md"); verify sync by diffing a fresh render. Never hand-edit NEWS.md. (5) siteConfig=NULL and siteConfig=reactive(getSiteInfo(expectConfigFile=FALSE)) are functionally identical (module falls back to the same call) ‚Äî I passed the explicit reactive for issue-fidelity. (6) CLAUDE.md + the appUI.R About tab still say ‚ÄúVersion 1.0.8‚Äù (DESCRIPTION 1.1.0.9000) ‚Äî stale since S56. (7) The 2 untracked files (..Rcheck/, PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html) + .DS_Store remain uncommitted (build-ignored / owner‚Äôs standing keep-call). (8) Default gh issue view errors on projectCards ‚Äî use gh issue view N --json <fields>. Started / Completed: 2026-06-15 Status: DONE. Development workstream (test backfill) under Strict TDD ‚Äî TDD phase declared every response; 3 phase gates via AskUserQuestion (PRE-RED‚ÜíRED full-strictness, RED‚ÜíGREEN full-run, GREEN‚ÜíREFACTOR lint+tidy); 0 stakeholder corrections. Regression backfill of already-shipped behavior ‚áí no production code (no R/, man/, NAMESPACE, NEWS.md changes). One close-out commit on add-methodology. - NEW tests/testthat/test-e2e-potential-parents-module.R ‚Äî 4 opt-in AppDriver blocks (each skip_if_not_installed("shinytest2"/"chromote") + skip_on_cran() + the create_test_app() opt-in gate + on.exit(app$stop())): (1) tab accessible (assert_active_pane); (2) controls present (gestation input / Find button / Download CSV); (3) CRUX ‚Äî upload_and_wait(rhesusPedigree_fromCenter.csv) ‚Üí Pedigree Browser ‚Üí Potential Parents ‚Üí set maxGestationalPeriod=210 ‚Üí click Find ‚Üí assert #potentialParents-statusMessage matches ‚ÄúFound candidate parents for 50 animal‚Äù + #potentialParents-resultsTable matches ‚Äúof 50 entries‚Äù + app$get_download("potentialParents-downloadParents") CSV = 50 rows & header id,nSires,nDams,sires,dams; (4) graceful degradation ‚Äî upload_and_wait(ExamplePedigree.csv) ‚Üí Find ‚Üí assert #potentialParents-statusMessage matches ‚Äúcolony-origin‚Äù. File-level const PP_EXPECTED_CANDIDATES <- 50L is the regression lock (used in 3 assertions). - The ‚Äú50‚Äù lock independently verified BEFORE the browser run through the app‚Äôs exact pipeline (read.csv ‚Üí runQcStudbook(minParentAge=2, reportChanges=TRUE)$cleaned ‚Üí setPopulation(_, NULL) ‚Üí findPedigreeNumber/findGeneration ‚Üí getPotentialParents(_, minParentAge=2.0, maxGestationalPeriod=210L)): 50 on BOTH the full processedPedigree AND the pedigreeData (generated-unknowns removed) variant ‚Äî so the count is robust to which object the module feeds. Matches S81‚Äôs live ‚Äú50‚Äù. The module exports pedigree = reactive(pedigreeData()) (modPedigree.R:344) ‚Äî i.e., shared$currentPedigree is the FILTERED pedigree, not processedPedigree; both give 50, so the distinction was immaterial here. - Verification chain: independent count-check (50) ‚Üí devtools::install(quick=TRUE) (the E2E drives the INSTALLED copy; confirmed modPotentialParentsServer exported + fixture installed) ‚Üí NOT_CRAN=true NPRC_RUN_E2E=true single-file run ‚Üí ....... = 7/7 PASS, 0 fail/skip/error ‚Üí clean-regression read (test_dir) 0 failed / 0 error / 0 true offenders with my file 4 skipped in the normal (E2E-off) run ‚Üí lintr 0 lints. - No helper extraction (REFACTOR scope held): the sibling test-e2e-* files deliberately repeat the skip/AppDriver boilerplate; extracting it would diverge from the established idiom, so the file matches its siblings in shape. Lint clean ‚áí no edits needed in REFACTOR. - [news-vs-changelog] ‚Üí CHANGELOG only (test-only addition, no R/ code, no user-facing feature; the feature landed in NEWS.md at S80). [macos-dupe-scan]: git add only the test file + SESSION_NOTES.md + PROJECT_LEARNINGS.md + CHANGELOG.md; excluded .DS_Store and the 2 standing untracked files (..Rcheck/, PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html).

Phase-3E (runtime smoke test): PERFORMED ‚Äî PASS. The browser E2E run IS the runtime verification (the strongest kind): real Chrome via chromote, real reactive graph, real file upload ‚Üí QC ‚Üí pedigree ‚Üí compute ‚Üí DT render ‚Üí CSV download. All 4 blocks pass against the installed app, including the populated 50-animal table, the CSV download (50 rows, correct columns), and the no-fromCenter graceful-degradation warning. shinytest2 + chromote are installed in this environment, so this ran for real ‚Äî NOT skipped. (NOT_CRAN=true is required or AppDriver aborts ‚ÄúOn CRAN‚Äù under Rscript; install dev code first ‚Äî Learning 78.)

Session 81 Handoff Evaluation (by Session 82): Score 9/10. S81 pre-named THIS exact deliverable as SUGGESTED-NEXT candidate (1) with high precision: ‚ÄúDurable opt-in E2E test ‚Ä¶ tests/testthat/test-e2e-potential-parents-module.R mirroring test-e2e-*-module.R (opt-in via NPRC_RUN_E2E, helper-shinytest2.R): now you can drive it with the shipped inst/extdata/rhesusPedigree_fromCenter.csv ‚Äî load it, navigate, Find, assert the table populates, exercise the CSV download.‚Äù Every load-bearing element held firsthand: the file name, the sibling pattern, the opt-in mechanism, the fixture, and the flow. The handoff also pre-loaded the verified count (50), the install-first/NOT_CRAN/opt-in/shinyBS-noise E2E recipe (Learning 78), the gotcha that shipped example files are error fixtures (so ExamplePedigree.csv is the right no-fromCenter graceful-degradation input), and the baselines (dashboard 98/100, 17 open issues, branch model, gh --json gotcha, the 2-untracked-files disposition, the stale version string). Zero time lost on what to build or where the seams are. The ‚àí1: the handoff didn‚Äôt flag that the module exports the filtered pedigreeData() (not processedPedigree) as shared$currentPedigree, which I had to trace to make the independent count-check faithful ‚Äî though it turned out both variants yield 50, so it was immaterial. Genuinely the implementer‚Äôs to discover. ROI: very high.

Self-assessment (Session 82): 9/10. Oriented fully (SAFEGUARDS + SESSION_RUNNER in full, notes top, dashboard 98/100, git, 17 issues, ghost-check ‚Üí none: 868a4975 = S81 close-out), reported, STOPPED for the owner‚Äôs pick. Claimed the session (Phase 1B stub BEFORE technical work ‚Äî grounding reads are read-only orientation). Declared the TDD phase every response and gated all 3 transitions via AskUserQuestion with the exact next-phase actions spelled out. Honest TDD framing up front: classified this as a regression backfill of shipped behavior (no production code), surfaced that at the PRE-RED‚ÜíRED gate, and mapped RED‚ÜíGREEN‚ÜíREFACTOR onto it truthfully (RED = author assertions with teeth that self-skip when opt-in is off; GREEN = run against the shipped feature + independently confirm the baked value first; REFACTOR = lint/tidy). Recompute-don‚Äôt-inherit: read the module, the helper, two sibling e2e tests, the server wiring, the QC/pedigree chain, and the module‚Äôs pedigree return firsthand. Did NOT treat build/skip-clean as runtime-clean (FM #24): actually ran the browser E2E (4/4 blocks, 7/7 expectations) ‚Äî the strongest Phase-3E. Independently verified the regression value (50) through the real pipeline BEFORE the browser run, so the E2E passed first try. Assertions have teeth: the ‚Äú50 animal‚Äù/‚Äúof 50 entries‚Äù/50-row-CSV checks only pass when the feature actually returns 50; a broken/empty feature renders the empty-state and fails them (not the body-grepl tautology the helper comments warn against). Right-sized SOLO ‚Äî a contained single-file test backfill with interactive TDD gates is not a breadth fan-out; a Workflow would have been theater (Learning 70/77 right-size heuristic, contained side) ‚Äî and that call holds even with ultracode ‚Äúon‚Äù, because the project methodology + documented learnings govern. Scope discipline: no R/ changes, no helper extraction (preserved the sibling idiom), did NOT touch the stale version string, the 2 untracked files, did NOT push or close issues. 0 stakeholder corrections. The ‚àí1 (honest): (a) the deliverable adds no new user-facing value ‚Äî though it closes the literal full-browser-chain gap S80/S81 both flagged; (b) I spent an extra read tracing which reactive the module exports (processedPedigree vs pedigreeData) before finding both yield 50 ‚Äî a more targeted first read could have saved one round-trip; (c) the table assertion couples to DT‚Äôs ‚Äúof N entries‚Äù info-text format (mirrors the existing pedigree e2e test‚Äôs ‚Äúof 375 entries‚Äù, so an accepted, idiomatic coupling ‚Äî but a DT phrasing change would require updating both).

‚áí SUGGESTED NEXT = owner‚Äôs pick. The E2E test ships, is runtime-verified, and skips cleanly in CI; nothing mid-flight. 17 open issues (none closed this session ‚Äî test-only). Candidates: - (1) ORIP wire-in (#47, low priority) ‚Äî the mount-only wire-in: 2 edits to mount the existing modORIPReporting* (appUI.R tabPanel + appServer.R server call). Real TDD + Phase-3E (now with BOTH the headless-AppDriver recipe in Learning 78 AND the opt-in browser-E2E pattern this session establishes ‚Äî you can add a test-e2e-orip-* mirroring this file). - (2) Docfix sweep ‚Äî getPedDirectRelatives @examples bug (R/getPedDirectRelatives.R:27 calls getLkDirectRelatives, not itself; one-line roxygen RED‚ÜíGREEN) ¬± dedicated tests for kinshipMatrixToKValues/getAncestors. Small TDD. - (3) UX polish (file an issue first): suppress the cosmetic ‚ÄúfromCenter ‚Üí fromcenter‚Äù caseChange warning that fires for every canonical camelCase column fixColumnNames lowercases-then-restores (fromCenter, recordStatus, geographicOrigin). Minor. - (4) Housekeeping: CLAUDE.md + appUI.R:198 still say ‚ÄúVersion 1.0.8‚Äù vs DESCRIPTION 1.1.0.9000 (carried since S56). (Verify any check ‚Äúfix‚Äù reproduces first ‚Äî the only standing check NOTE has been the transient timestamp one.) - (5) Push add-methodology to origin (now ahead by ~35 after this close-out; S51 promoted prior work via PR #41). CHANGED (docs): CHANGELOG.md (S82 entry), PROJECT_LEARNINGS.md (Learning 80 at tail), SESSION_NOTES.md (this handoff). Read firsthand (unchanged): R/modPotentialParents.R (UI controls :65-109; server button/eventReactive :141; statusMessage branches :161-194; downloadHandler :206), tests/testthat/helper-shinytest2.R (create_test_app opt-in :200, create_app_driver :235, navigate_to_tab :258, assert_active_pane :415, upload_and_wait :150, get_html_safe/click_element_safe/get_test_data_path, E2E_TIMEOUT), tests/testthat/test-e2e-pedigree-module.R (the upload‚Üínavigate‚Üíassert-populated-DT pattern, :60-89 ‚Äúof 375 entries‚Äù), tests/testthat/test-e2e-genetic-value-module.R (the per-block static-surface idiom), R/appServer.R:244-295 (shared$currentPedigree observer :252-255; module wiring :291-295), R/modInput.R:251-302 (readDataFile exact reader), R/modInput.R:407-423 (qcStudbook/runQcStudbook QC call), R/modPedigree.R:260-311 (processedPedigree‚ÜípedigreeData), R/modPedigree.R:343-347 (module exports pedigree = pedigreeData()), tests/testthat/test_getPotentialParents.R (unit fixture builds raw rhesusPedigree+fromCenter, no QC). Transient (NOT committed): none (all checks were inline Rscript -e).

Gotchas: (1) The new E2E test is OPT-IN (NPRC_RUN_E2E=true) and drives the INSTALLED package ‚Äî to run it: devtools::install() dev code first, then NOT_CRAN=true NPRC_RUN_E2E=true Rscript -e '...test_file(...)'. Without NOT_CRAN=true AppDriver aborts ‚ÄúOn CRAN‚Äù; without install the installed copy may be stale (Learning 78). (2) shinytest2 + chromote ARE installed here ‚Äî the browser E2E genuinely runs; don‚Äôt assume ‚Äúno Chrome ‚Üí skip‚Äù. (3) PP_EXPECTED_CANDIDATES <- 50L is a regression lock ‚Äî if the fixture or getPotentialParents ever changes the count, this fails by design; re-derive via the pipeline (read.csv ‚Üí runQcStudbook(...)$cleaned ‚Üí setPopulation ‚Üí getPotentialParents(_, 2.0, 210L)) and update. Both processedPedigree and pedigreeData yield 50 today. (4) The table assertion uses DT‚Äôs ‚Äúof 50 entries‚Äù info text (mirrors the pedigree e2e‚Äôs ‚Äúof 375 entries‚Äù); a DT phrasing change would require updating it. (5) shared$currentPedigree = the FILTERED pedigreeData() (modPedigree.R:344), auto-populated by the observer at appServer.R:252-255 once the studbook is ready ‚Äî but blocks 3/4 still visit Pedigree Browser first to faithfully mirror S81‚Äôs manual flow and dodge any output-suspension flakiness. (6) ExamplePedigree.csv is the right no-fromCenter graceful-degradation input (QC-clean, no colony-origin field); the populated path needs rhesusPedigree_fromCenter.csv. (7) CLAUDE.md + appUI.R:198 still say ‚ÄúVersion 1.0.8‚Äù (DESCRIPTION 1.1.0.9000) ‚Äî stale since S56. (8) The 2 untracked files + .DS_Store remain uncommitted (build-ignored / owner‚Äôs standing keep-call). (9) Default gh issue view errors on projectCards ‚Äî use gh issue view N --json <fields>. Branch model unchanged: this close-out is on add-methodology; master gets it on the next sync/PR (S51 promoted prior work via PR #41).

What Session 81 Did

Deliverable: Owner-confirmed close of #48 (the getPotentialParents ‚ÄúPotential Parents‚Äù tab shipped by S80), gated on a live owner click-through verified end-to-end. To make the populated path reachable, staged a purpose-built clean fromCenter example dataset (every shipped pedigree example is a deliberate input-error QC fixture ‚Äî owner-confirmed). (DONE ‚Äî click-through PASS (graceful-degradation + populated 50-animal table + CSV download); inst/extdata/rhesusPedigree_fromCenter.csv added; #48 CLOSED.) Started / Completed: 2026-06-15 Status: DONE. Verification + issue-management workstream (TDD phase = N/A declared every response ‚Äî added an example dataset + diagnosis, no production logic/tests). One close-out commit on add-methodology. No R/, tests/, man/, .lintr, or NEWS.md changes. - The click-through-first call (owner‚Äôs pick) earned its keep. Provided the step-by-step script (Part A graceful-degradation on a standard file; Part B populated path on the new file). The owner ran it live and caught a real defect in my staged file that my headless pre-check had blessed ‚Üí I fixed and re-verified against the app‚Äôs EXACT ingest path before close. - NEW inst/extdata/rhesusPedigree_fromCenter.csv (375 animals = nprcgenekeepr::rhesusPedigree + fromCenter = TRUE; unknown parents written as literal NA matching ExamplePedigree.csv). Verified through the real pipeline (app reader ‚Üí runQcStudbook ‚Üí setPopulation ‚Üí getPotentialParents): QC clean, fromCenter preserved, 50 animals with candidates. Owner chose the rhesusPedigree source (vs full-ExamplePedigree / modify-in-place) via AskUserQuestion. - Defect caught by the click-through (FM #24 ‚Äî replication diverged from the app): my first file wrote unknowns as empty cells (write.csv(na="")); the app‚Äôs text reader (modInput.R:274 = read.table(..., fill=TRUE, quote="\"") with default na.strings="NA") reads "" as the empty string, so "" landed in both the sire and dam columns ‚Üí correctParentSex.R:71 intersect(sires,dams) flagged ‚ÄúSubject(s) listed as both sire and dam‚Äù (the empty offending id = the ‚Äúcell empty‚Äù the owner saw). My pre-check had used na.strings=c("","NA"), silently converting ""‚ÜíNA and masking it. Rewrote with na="NA" and re-verified with the app‚Äôs exact reader ‚Üí clean. - Diagnosed two non-defects firsthand from the code (not guesses): (1) the ‚ÄúColumn name case changed: fromCenter ‚Üí fromcenter‚Äù warning is cosmetic ‚Äî fixColumnNames.R:20 lowercases all headers (logging the caseChange), :61 restores fromcenter‚ÜífromCenter; the cleaned studbook keeps fromCenter, which is exactly what getPotentialParents (case-sensitive names(ped)=="fromCenter") needs. Same noise hits recordStatus/geographicOrigin. (2) ‚ÄúNo data available in table‚Äù = the empty Errors tab DT placeholder (no errors). The earlier repeat of ‚Äúboth sire and dam‚Äù was a stale upload ‚Äî cleared once the owner re-read the rewritten file. - [news-vs-changelog] ‚Üí CHANGELOG only (verification + a test-support example dataset + issue close = dev-process history; the feature already landed in NEWS.md at S80; no R/ code changed). [macos-dupe-scan]: git add only inst/extdata/rhesusPedigree_fromCenter.csv + SESSION_NOTES.md + PROJECT_LEARNINGS.md + CHANGELOG.md; excluded .DS_Store and the 2 standing untracked files (..Rcheck/, PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html).

Phase-3E (runtime smoke test): PERFORMED ‚Äî PASS (owner-run live click-through). The strongest possible runtime verification: real browser, real reactive graph, real file upload. Part A (graceful degradation): ExamplePedigree.csv (QC-clean, no fromCenter) ‚Üí Potential Parents ‚Üí Find ‚Üí empty-state warning ‚ÄúThis dataset has no colony-origin (‚ÄòfromCenter‚Äô) field‚Ä¶‚Äù ‚Äî proves the tab mounts, the button fires, no crash. Part B (populated): rhesusPedigree_fromCenter.csv ‚Üí QC pass ‚Üí Pedigree Browser populates ‚Üí Potential Parents ‚Üí Find ‚Üí 50-animal sortable table (status ‚ÄúFound candidate parents for 50 animal(s)‚Ä¶‚Äù) ‚Üí CSV downloaded as potential_parents_2026-06-15.csv (matches paste0("potential_parents_", Sys.Date(), ".csv")). Existing tabs intact.

Key files (this session): NEW (committed): inst/extdata/rhesusPedigree_fromCenter.csv (375 animals; fromCenter=TRUE; unknowns as literal NA; the Potential Parents demo/click-through fixture). CHANGED (docs): CHANGELOG.md (S81 entry), PROJECT_LEARNINGS.md (Learning 79 at tail), SESSION_NOTES.md (this handoff). GitHub: #48 CLOSED (owner-confirmed; close comment posted). Read firsthand (unchanged): R/modPotentialParents.R (server fromCenter empty-state :176), R/getPotentialParents.R (fromCenter gate :38), R/appServer.R:244-295 (shared$currentPedigree flow), R/modInput.R (readDataFile:251-296 exact reader; QC call :407-423), R/runQcStudbook.R (cleaned=NULL on any error :160), R/correctParentSex.R:71 (intersect(sires,dams) ‚Üí ‚Äúboth sire and dam‚Äù), R/fixColumnNames.R:20,61 (lowercase-then-restore), R/getPedigree.R, R/modPedigree.R:260-310 (pedigree auto-produces from studbook), R/runModularApp.R (in-namespace appUI()/appServer). Transient (NOT committed): /tmp/s81_*.R.

Gotchas: (1) The shipped pedigree example files are deliberately error-laden input-error QC fixtures (jmac csv: 2 hard parent-age errors; jmac-edited: a ‚Äú.‚Äù in an ID; xlsx: invalid dates; ExamplePedigree: QC-clean but no fromCenter) ‚Äî none reaches the populated Potential Parents path. The clean demo file is inst/extdata/rhesusPedigree_fromCenter.csv. (2) Replicate the app‚Äôs EXACT reader when pre-verifying example data: text path = read.table(..., fill=TRUE, quote="\"") with default na.strings="NA" (modInput.R:274) ‚Äî empty cells stay "" (NOT NA). Write unknown parents as literal NA (write.csv(..., na="NA")). Using na.strings=c("","NA") in a check masks the empty-cell ‚Äúboth sire and dam‚Äù bug (FM #24). (3) The ‚ÄúfromCenter ‚Üí fromcenter‚Äù caseChange warning is cosmetic ‚Äî fixColumnNames.R:20 lowercases all headers (logs it), :61 restores fromCenter; the cleaned studbook keeps fromCenter. (4) processQcStudbookResult()$hasErrors does NOT include the sireAndDam category ‚Äî the app‚Äôs Errors tab renders the raw errorLst$sireAndDam directly; inspect the errorLst components, not just hasErrors, when judging ‚Äúis it clean.‚Äù (5) Run the dev app with the new tab via pkgload::load_all("."); runModularApp() (builds from appUI()/appServer in-namespace ‚Äî no reinstall; an older installed copy lacks the tab and the line-61 restore). (6) #48 is CLOSED (owner-confirmed). (7) CLAUDE.md + appUI.R:198 still say ‚ÄúVersion 1.0.8‚Äù (DESCRIPTION 1.1.0.9000) ‚Äî stale since S56. (8) The 2 untracked files + .DS_Store remain uncommitted (build-ignored / owner‚Äôs standing keep-call). (9) Default gh issue view errors on projectCards ‚Äî use gh issue view N --json <fields>. Branch model unchanged: this close-out is on add-methodology; master gets it on the next sync/PR (S51 promoted prior work via PR #41).

Started / Completed: 2026-06-14 / 2026-06-15 Status: DONE. Implementation/bug-fix workstream under Strict TDD. TDD phase declared every response (PRE-RED ‚Üí RED ‚Üí GREEN ‚Üí REFACTOR); 3 phase gates via AskUserQuestion (PRE-RED‚ÜíRED, RED‚ÜíGREEN, GREEN‚ÜíREFACTOR), 0 stakeholder corrections. One close-out commit on add-methodology. - NEW R/modPotentialParents.R: pure flattenPotentialParents() (list-of-lists|NULL ‚Üí df id,nSires,nDams,sires,dams; toString() collapse; NULL/empty ‚Üí 0-row; @noRd internal); modPotentialParentsUI() (numeric maxGestationalPeriod default 210, ‚ÄúFind Potential Parents‚Äù button, DT::DTOutput sortable table, downloadButton, uiOutput status/empty-state); modPotentialParentsServer(id, pedigree = NULL, minParentAge = 2.0) (eventReactive(findParents) ‚Üí getPotentialParents ‚Üí flatten; DT::renderDT; downloadHandler CSV; graceful degradation). Both mod functions @export. - NEW tests/testthat/test_modPotentialParents.R: 14 tests / 43 expectations ‚Äî helper (cols, NULL/empty‚Üí0-row, multi-animal flatten, empty-sires‚Üí""/0, write.csv round-trip), UI (4 namespaced controls + ‚ÄúFind Potential Parents‚Äù + default 210 + shiny.tag), server via shiny::testServer (happy path on rhesus fixture ‚Üí BRI2MW present; no-fromCenter‚Üíempty; no-unknowns‚Üíempty; return-shape). All pass; lint clean (0). - Wiring (2 edits): appUI.R ‚Äî tabPanel("Potential Parents", icon("search"), modPotentialParentsUI("potentialParents")) after Breeding Groups; appServer.R ‚Äî modPotentialParentsServer("potentialParents", pedigree = reactive(shared$currentPedigree)) after the Breeding Groups module. - Data seams honored (from #48): no fromCenter col ‚Üí getPotentialParents returns NULL ‚Üí empty-state (not error); minParentAge does NOT flow to shared so it stayed a server param default 2.0 (QC value) ‚Äî owner ratified only the gestation UI input, so no second UI input added (scope held); empty results ‚Üí empty-state message. - Verification: GREEN devtools::check() 0/0/0; post-REFACTOR check() 0 errors / 0 warnings / 1 NOTE (unable to verify current time ‚Äî transient environmental clock note, NOT code); full clean-regression read 0 real failed/error (847 rows); lintr clean on both new files; document() regenerated man/modPotentialParents*.Rd + NAMESPACE (flattenPotentialParents stayed internal). - [news-vs-changelog]: user-facing feature ‚Üí BOTH NEWS.md (new ‚ÄúShiny application‚Äù bullet under 1.1.0.9000) and CHANGELOG.md (S80 process entry). First code session since S74, so NEWS gets an entry (S76‚ÄìS79 were design/process ‚Üí CHANGELOG-only). [macos-dupe-scan]: git add only the source/test/doc/notes files; the 2 standing untracked files (..Rcheck/, PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html) excluded + untouched.

Phase-3E (runtime smoke test): PERFORMED ‚Äî PASS. Booted the assembled app headlessly via shinytest2::AppDriver against inst/shinytest/app.R (= shinyApp(appUI(), appServer)). Gotchas to reuse: set NOT_CRAN=true (AppDriver aborts ‚ÄúOn CRAN‚Äù under Rscript otherwise); devtools::install() the dev package FIRST (the e2e app drives the installed copy); the e2e suite is opt-in (NPRC_RUN_E2E=true) and skips in test()/check(). Confirmed: app boots with full server init (incl.¬Ýthe new module), the tab + all 4 controls mount, default 210 set, navigation to the tab works, existing tabs (Breeding Groups, Genetic Value Analysis) intact, and the module‚Äôs outputs (statusMessage/resultsTable/downloadParents) register error-free. The only log ‚Äúerrors‚Äù are pre-existing shinyBS is not defined JS reference errors (app-wide, used by other tabs‚Äô popovers ‚Äî NOT from this module; separated by grepping the logs for the potentialParents- namespace). Not done (honest boundary): the literal single-chain browser E2E (upload a file ‚Üí create pedigree ‚Üí click ‚Üí see table ‚Üí download the CSV) ‚Äî the compute/table/CSV path is runtime-verified by testServer on a real fromCenter rhesus pedigree (the real reactive graph, not mocks) and the integration mount by AppDriver; the data-loaded full-browser interaction is split across those two rather than one E2E.

Session 79 Handoff Evaluation (by Session 80): Score 9/10. S79 pre-named THIS exact deliverable as SUGGESTED-NEXT candidate (1) with remarkable precision: ‚ÄúImplement #48 ‚Ä¶ a real TDD code session (RED‚ÜíGREEN‚ÜíREFACTOR with phase gates) building R/modPotentialParents.R (numeric maxGestationalPeriod input default 210, ‚ÄòFind Potential Parents‚Äô button, results table, CSV download) + tests/testthat/test_modPotentialParents.R + the 2 wiring edits (appUI.R tab + appServer.R server call), with a mandatory Phase-3E runtime smoke test ‚Ä¶ Start from #48‚Äôs task list + data seams.‚Äù Every element held firsthand: the exact file names, the exact controls, the exact 2 wiring edits, the Phase-3E mandate, the data seams (fromCenter‚ÜíNULL, reuse 2-yr minParentAge, empty-state), and the baselines (dashboard 98/100, 18 issues, gh --json gotcha, 2-untracked-files disposition, stale CLAUDE.md version, branch model). Zero time spent discovering what to build or where the seams are ‚Äî I went straight from orient ‚Üí grounding reads ‚Üí gates. What helped most: #48‚Äôs ratified forks + documented seams meant the design was settled; I only had to choose implementation-level details (helper extraction, DT-for-sortable, minParentAge-as-param). The ‚àí1 (structural per-issue ceiling, not a fault): the handoff couldn‚Äôt pre-load the Phase-3E toolchain gotchas (NOT_CRAN, install-first, opt-in e2e, shinyBS log noise) or that minParentAge doesn‚Äôt reach shared (forcing the param choice) ‚Äî all genuinely the implementer‚Äôs to discover. What was wrong: nothing material. ROI: very high.

GREEN was minimal and honored the ratified scope (no second UI input). Scope discipline: did NOT close #48 (owner-confirmed close), did NOT touch the stale CLAUDE.md/appUI version string, the 2 untracked files, or push. Honest 9 ‚Äî a complete, runtime-verified vertical slice shipping genuine user-facing value with full TDD discipline and 0 corrections. Gotchas: (1) #48 is implemented but stays OPEN pending owner-confirmed close (don‚Äôt close without owner sign-off ‚Äî the standing rule). (2) Phase-3E headless-smoke recipe (reusable for #47 and future wire-ins): NOT_CRAN=true Rscript + devtools::install() dev code first + AppDriver$new(system.file("shinytest", package="nprcgenekeepr")); grep logs for YOUR namespace, not ‚Äúerror‚Äù (the shinyBS is not defined errors are pre-existing app-wide noise). (3) minParentAge is a server param (default 2.0), NOT a UI input ‚Äî it does not flow through shared (modInput‚Äôs minParentAge reactive isn‚Äôt propagated to appServer‚Äôs shared); a future ‚Äúlet the user set minParentAge in this tab‚Äù would need either a new UI input or threading it through shared. (4) maxGestationalPeriod = MAX (210 rhesus, ~165 typical), documented ‚Äúinteger‚Äù but NOT type-checked ‚Äî carried; the UI numericInput prefills 210. (5) Species-keyed gestation stays #46 ‚Äî v1 is single-species rhesus; do NOT pull #46 in. (6) The post-REFACTOR check() NOTE (unable to verify current time) is environmental (clock/network), not a defect ‚Äî the GREEN check was 0/0/0; don‚Äôt chase it. (7) flattenPotentialParents is internal (@noRd) ‚Äî accessible in tests via bare name under load_all; not part of the public API (keeps #37‚Äôs export surface from growing). (8) Default gh issue view errors on projectCards ‚Äî use gh issue view N --json <fields>. (9) CLAUDE.md + appUI.R:198 still say ‚ÄúVersion 1.0.8‚Äù (DESCRIPTION 1.1.0.9000) ‚Äî stale, carried since S56. (10) The 2 untracked files remain ‚Äî build-ignored / owner‚Äôs standing keep-call. (11) NEWS.md is GENERATED from NEWS.Rmd (github_document) ‚Äî edit the .Rmd source and rmarkdown::render("NEWS.Rmd"), never hand-edit NEWS.md. This session found prior sessions had hand-edited NEWS.md, leaving NEWS.Rmd missing NEW-47/48/49 (now fixed). Verify sync with diff <(Rscript -e 'rmarkdown::render("NEWS.Rmd", output_file="/tmp/n.md", quiet=TRUE)') NEWS.md. Branch model unchanged: this close-out is on add-methodology; master gets it on the next sync/PR (S51 promoted prior work via PR #41).

No R/, tests/, man/, .lintr, or NEWS.md changes. - Method (Workflow under ultracode, Learning 70 breadth side + new Learning 75): a verify-and-sharpen workflow (wf_b8035a53-5be) ‚Äî 8 parallel item-verifiers (one per register item, each re-reading the spec‚Äôs code claims firsthand against the working tree and adversarially stress-testing its [REC]) ‚Üí an adversarial completeness critic. The critic earned its keep: it reduced an over-asked 8-item register to 4 genuine owner-decisions (items 1/2/3 + item 6‚Äôs provenance half), classified the rest as ratifiable corollaries/deferrals, and surfaced two ¬ß7 policy gaps absent from ¬ß13. - Two firsthand corrections to the S76 spec (‚Üí Learning 75a): (a) item 2‚Äôs written [REC] is unsound ‚Äî getPotentialParents.R:46-48‚Äôs inclusive-OR pUnknown filter means a both-unknown infant‚Äôs own birth-time location is a valid dam-side anchor (only the sire side is anchorless), so the decision flipped from the spec‚Äôs ‚Äúrequire ‚â•1 known parent‚Äù to dam-side colocation only; (b) ¬ß10 mis-cited #36 (‚ÄúAdd chimpanzee-specific age pyramid plot settings‚Äù, a display ticket) as the ‚Äúmake species first-class‚Äù prerequisite ‚Äî first-class species was un-ticketed, now filed as #46. - Owner decisions (via AskUserQuestion, 2 staggered rounds ‚Äî item 2 deliberately placed in round 2 so it could be informed by item 1‚Äôs answer; all ratified as recommended, 0 corrections): (1) missing-dam = mother‚Äìinfant co-housing model + required no-default species-tunable postnatalCoHousingWindow + gestation-presence, strictly soft-rank (hard-filter rejected); (2) both-unknown = dam-side only via focal anchor; (3) output = additive-only invariant locked, carrier deferred; (4) coherent obfuscation (one shared per-animal delta + alias FK-remap, built WITH #28); (5) v1 single-species, #28 ‚ä• first-class species; (6) pull-date provenance stamp (full bitemporal deferred); (7+8) defer flat-file & POSIXct (LabKey-only, Date res); ¬ß7 QC policy (open-start = no overlap; contradictory rows = QC-warn). - The outward-facing work: ratification comment on #28 (#28-issuecomment-4703716881, body /tmp/s77_ratify28.md ‚Äî transient) annotating every item [DECIDED-S77]/[SIZING] with the two corrections inline + sizing notes for the implementer; The critic earned its keep (‚Üí Learning 74): it caught an inter-reader contradiction (Facet B ‚Äúspecies novelCol survives‚Äù vs Facet D ‚Äúspecies dropped‚Äù), flagged Facet E‚Äôs 3-case inference model as invented design presented as findings, surfaced the obfuscation-coherence constraint neither issue mentioned, and produced a clean owner-decision list + 13-section outline. - Recompute-don‚Äôt-inherit (Learning 70/72c/73 ‚Üí 74b): re-read every load-bearing file firsthand before the outward-facing post ‚Äî getPotentialParents.R (full, post-S74; #45‚Äôs :72-94 map was stale), getPossibleCols, getDateColNames, getSiteInfo (live default /ONPRC/EHR; roxygen /SNPRC is stale), getDemographics, obfuscateDate, obfuscatePed, fixColumnNames, qcStudbook:281-283 (resolved the species contradiction firsthand ‚Äî novelCols survive). - Owner decisions (via AskUserQuestion, 4 questions, applied exactly): temporal model = Date-ranged residency intervals (day resolution); grain = configurable, finest-available default; effect = soft rank with fallback; v1 scope = source-agnostic model + optional location arg, byte-identical when location = NULL (not hard-blocked on #11/#12). - The outward-facing work: spec comment on #28 (#28-issuecomment-4703570168, body /tmp/s76_spec28.md ‚Äî transient) with a [DECIDED]/[REC]/[OPEN] status legend, a data dictionary, the overlap predicate, ingestion design mirroring getDemographics/getSiteInfo, a null/partial-coverage matrix, the obfuscation-coherence requirement (¬ß9), an open-decisions register, and implementation acceptance criteria gated on #11/#12/#37/#36. What Session 74 Did

Deliverable: Implement #31 ‚Äî replace the dam-exclusion ‚Äúhack‚Äù (fixed ¬±¬Ω-year birth window) in getPotentialParents with a principled gestation-derived window driven by the existing maxGestationalPeriod parameter (owner-decided S73: reuse/extend that param, NO new parameter). The near-term, low-lift sub-task of umbrella #45. (DONE ‚Äî feature shipped; devtools::check() 0/0/0; full suite 0/0; #31 left OPEN, awaiting owner confirm to close.) Started / Completed: 2026-06-13 Status: DONE. Code session under strict TDD: RED‚ÜíGREEN‚ÜíREFACTOR(skipped) ‚Äî a separate pre-RED scope/approach decision + all three transition gates (PRE-RED‚ÜíRED, RED‚ÜíGREEN, GREEN‚ÜíREFACTOR-skipped) posed via AskUserQuestion; TDD phase declared atop every response. 0 stakeholder corrections. One close-out commit on add-methodology. - The change (ONE rule, one line of logic): a female who delivered another offspring within maxGestationalPeriod days of the focal birth cannot have gestated the focal animal (a female bears one offspring at a time), so she is excluded as a candidate dam. The births window (getPotentialParents.R:83-85) now uses pUnknown$birth[i] ¬± maxGestationalPeriod instead of ¬± (dYear / 2L) (182.5 d). The :106 dam exclusion (potentialDams[!id %in% births$dam, ]) and :92-95 comment block had the TODO ‚Äúhack‚Äù replaced with a principled explanation; the @param maxGestationalPeriod roxygen (now ~:17-27) documents it as the conservative MAX gestation (e.g.¬Ý210 for rhesus vs ~165 typical), its dual sire-retention + dam-exclusion use, and the intentional sire(conception)/dam(birth) exit-check asymmetry. - Owner decision (pre-RED, via AskUserQuestion): minimal principled change ‚Äî only the births window; document the exit-check asymmetry as correct (NOT changed); leave the preferential band untouched (proven a no-op); recompute fixtures with per-delta justification; keep maxGestationalPeriod=210L in tests. Applied exactly as chosen. - Recompute-don‚Äôt-inherit (Learning 70/72 applied to a code change ‚Üí Learning 73): in PRE-RED I read issue #31/#45 + getPotentialParents.R + test_getPotentialParents.R firsthand, then built a throwaway read-only oracle (/tmp/s74_explore.R, never touching R/) to quantify the behavior change BEFORE writing tests ‚Äî every fixture delta derived independently + justified biologically, not from running the production change. - TDD trail (RED‚ÜíGREEN): RED edited ONLY test_getPotentialParents.R ‚Äî recomputed exact-set fixtures (dams_1 drops 0B7XRI/PHCADH; dams_4 drops 1SIP4V/DMI0QY/HV7LZ3, each with a justification comment citing the conflicting-offspring offset) + added 2 driving tests (a hand-verifiable synthetic-exclusion pedigree + a differential-responsiveness test, acceptance criterion #2). Confirmed RED: 4 expected failures for the right reasons; the 4 unaffected tests passed. GREEN: the one-line window change + comment + roxygen + devtools::document() ‚Üí all green. - Verification: test file 21/21; full suite 0 failed / 0 error (real + total, excl test-app-/test-e2e-); lint 0 on both changed files; devtools::check() 0 errors / 0 warnings / 0 NOTES (cleaner than the S71/S72-predicted spelling NOTE ‚Äî it did not fire; my new doc words are all dictionary words, spell-check clean). [news-vs-changelog] ‚Üí BOTH (behavior change to an exported function is user-facing): NEWS.md NEW-49 + CHANGELOG.md S74 under [Unreleased]. [macos-dupe-scan]: explicit git add of only the 7 modified files; the 2 standing untracked files (..Rcheck/, PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html) excluded + untouched.

Phase-3E (runtime smoke test): N/A and stated ‚Äî getPotentialParents is exported but UNWIRED (zero app/production callers; only its test + inst/extdata/trulyUnknownParents.R), so there is no Shiny runtime path to smoke-test. Its runtime behavior is exercised directly by the suite (the synthetic + differential + recomputed-characterization tests all call the function). No app wiring changed.

Session 73 Handoff Evaluation (by Session 74): Score 9/10. S73 pre-named THIS deliverable as SUGGESTED-NEXT candidate (1) and pre-loaded essentially the entire risk surface: the exact lines (getPotentialParents.R:72-94), the ‚ÄúBEHAVIOR CHANGE, not a pure refactor‚Äù flag, the exact-set expect_identical fixture caveat (recompute + justify, don‚Äôt silently regenerate), the owner-decided ‚Äúreuse/extend maxGestationalPeriod, no new param,‚Äù the load-bearing reframing (the param already exists, applied sire-side at :62 ‚Äî so #31 extends it to the dam side, not adds it fresh), the 210L vs ~165 d rhesus reconciliation prompt, the sire/dam exit-check asymmetry note (:62 vs :69), the unwired-function gotcha (#37), the species caveat, and the gh issue view --json gotcha. Every anchor held firsthand ‚Äî I spent ~zero time discovering what to do or where the risk lived. The ‚àí1 is the structural per-issue depth ceiling (same shape as S69‚ÄìS72): the handoff names where to start, not the answers this session‚Äôs research produced ‚Äî it could not pre-compute the 5 exact fixture deltas, nor pre-prove that the preferential-band move is a no-op or that the exit-check asymmetry is biologically correct (so ‚Äúreconcile if appropriate‚Äù resolved to ‚Äúdocument, don‚Äôt change‚Äù). One minor framing nit in the safe direction: it phrased ‚Äúreconcile 210L vs actual rhesus gestation‚Äù as if a code change might be needed, when it‚Äôs a documentation/interpretation matter (resolved by documenting 210 as the conservative max). No inaccuracies cost time. ROI: very high ‚Äî best-prepared implement handoff in the recent chain.

Self-assessment (Session 74): 9/10. Oriented fully (SAFEGUARDS + SESSION_RUNNER in full, session-notes top, dashboard 98/100, git, all 16 issues, ghost-check ‚Üí none), reported, STOPPED for the owner‚Äôs pick. Claimed the session with a Phase 1B stub BEFORE technical work. RED was honest: 4 expected failures confirmed for the right reasons; the new exact fixtures were derived from the independent oracle + per-delta biological justification (NOT from running the production change ‚Äî that would be circular), and backed by two from-first-principles driving tests (synthetic-exclusion + differential-responsiveness) ‚Üí Learning 73. GREEN minimal: one-line window change + principled comment + roxygen; the :92-93 TODO resolved. Verification depth: full suite (0/0) + lint (0) + check() (0/0/0) + spell-check clean. Scope discipline: proved the preferential-band move is a no-op and documented the asymmetry as correct rather than changing either to ‚Äúlook responsive‚Äù (FM #8 resisted); did NOT close #31, touch the stale CLAUDE.md version, the 2 untracked files, or push. Right-sized SOLO (contained single-function change, directly checkable via an oracle + suite + check() ‚Äî Learning 70/72 breadth heuristic; the read-only exploration was research I needed in my own context, not a fan-out). Stakeholder corrections: 0. Honest 9 ‚Äî a clean, fully-verified, 0-correction behavior change with a justified fixture recomputation and a genuinely new methodology contribution. The ‚àí1 (honest): species-specific gestation remains a documented dependency I did not advance (correctly out of scope), and the function stays unwired (#37) so this delivers package-API value, not app value yet ‚Äî both correctly out of scope but worth naming so the next session doesn‚Äôt expect user-visible effect.

‚áí SUGGESTED NEXT = owner‚Äôs pick. #31 is IMPLEMENTED (feature shipped, check()-green); nothing mid-flight. 16 open issues. Candidates: - (1) Close #31 ‚Äî the gestation-derived dam window is done and check-green; close with a pointer to the S74 commit (would drop 16 ‚Üí 15 open). Do NOT close #45 / #28 (umbrella + deferred sub-task), and do NOT close #1, #5, #9, or any OPEN issue without firsthand evidence.

Key files (this session): CHANGED R/getPotentialParents.R (births window :83-85 now ¬± maxGestationalPeriod; :92-95 comment principled, TODO resolved; @param roxygen ~:17-27 expanded ‚Äî conservative-max meaning + dual use + intentional asymmetry), man/getPotentialParents.Rd (regenerated), tests/testthat/test_getPotentialParents.R (recomputed dams_1/dams_4 with per-delta justification comments + 2 NEW test_that blocks: synthetic-exclusion ~:120-165, differential-responsiveness ~:166-189), NEWS.md (NEW-49, Pedigree-curation section), CHANGELOG.md (S74 under [Unreleased]), PROJECT_LEARNINGS.md (Learning 73 at tail), SESSION_NOTES.md (this handoff). The 2 standing untracked files left untouched. TRANSIENT (read-only oracles, NOT committed): /tmp/s74_explore.R, /tmp/s74_synth.R.

Gotchas: (1) #31 is IMPLEMENTED but still OPEN ‚Äî close (with a commit pointer) only on owner confirm; feature done + check-green = a clean close candidate (16 ‚Üí 15), not re-verification. (2) The change is exactly ONE rule: births exclusion window = ¬± maxGestationalPeriod (was ¬± dYear/2L = 182.5). Only the births filter changed ‚Äî the preferential band (births_plus_minus_one) and the sire/dam exit-checks are UNCHANGED by design: the band move was proven a behavioral no-op (the wider exclusion at :106 removes the overlap region before the preferential intersection runs), and the asymmetry (exit ‚â• birth ‚àí gestation sire vs exit ‚â• birth dam) is biologically correct (sire‚Üíconception, dam‚Üíbirth) and now documented ‚Äî do not ‚Äúreconcile‚Äù them into a change. (3) Behavior change to exact-set fixtures: dams_1 dropped 0B7XRI(‚àí193 d)/PHCADH(+195 d); dams_4 dropped 1SIP4V(+183 d)/DMI0QY(+192 d)/HV7LZ3(‚àí192 d) ‚Äî each justified by an other-offspring birth within ¬±210 d (comments in the test file). If a future session changes the tests‚Äô maxGestationalPeriod=210L, these fixtures move again. (4) maxGestationalPeriod is the MAX (conservative upper bound), NOT the typical gestation ‚Äî 210 for rhesus vs ~165 typical; the roxygen documents this. Do NOT ‚Äúfix‚Äù 210‚Üí165. (5) getPotentialParents is exported but UNWIRED (only its test + inst/extdata/trulyUnknownParents.R) ‚Äî #31 delivers package-API value, not app value, until #37 integration. (6) devtools::check() returned 0/0/0 this session ‚Äî the pre-existing spelling.Rout.save NOTE (S71/S72) did NOT appear; may be flag/environment-dependent. Don‚Äôt assume it‚Äôs gone; verify if it matters. (7) Default gh issue view errors on projectCards ‚Äî use gh issue view N --json <fields>. (8) CLAUDE.md still says ‚ÄúVersion 1.0.8‚Äù (DESCRIPTION 1.1.0.9000) ‚Äî stale, carried since S56. (9) The 2 untracked files remain ‚Äî build-ignored / owner‚Äôs standing keep-call. Branch model unchanged: this close-out is on add-methodology; master gets it on the next sync/PR (S51 promoted prior work via PR #41).

What Session 73 Did

Deliverable: Consolidate the parent-ID cluster (#31 + #28) into one umbrella design issue, grounded in a firsthand map of the parent-identification subsystem (getPotentialParents.R), with a decided disposition for the two originals. (DONE ‚Äî umbrella #45 created OPEN; #31 + #28 kept OPEN as distinct, cross-linked sub-tasks (NOT duplicates). Open issues 15 ‚Üí 16.) Started / Completed: 2026-06-13 Status: DONE. Grooming/design session (no production code or tests; TDD phase = N/A declared every response ‚Äî same classification as S70‚Äôs #44 consolidation). One close-out commit on add-methodology. No R/, tests/, man/, .lintr, or NEWS.md changes. - Firsthand subsystem map (Workflow under ultracode): 2-phase workflow (wf_3acaf054-98d) ‚Äî phase 1: 4 parallel facet readers (core fn / callers-integration / gestation+location data-infra / tests); phase 2: an adversarial completeness critic over the combined inventory. The critic earned its keep (Learning 70 pattern): it overturned the readers‚Äô overstatements and produced the load-bearing verdict ‚Äî the two issues share only a thin scalar primitive (conception date = birth ‚àí gestation) and have severe lift asymmetry, so they are NOT duplicates. - Recompute-don‚Äôt-inherit (Learning 70 ‚Üí 72c): before the outward-facing create/link I re-read the load-bearing files firsthand. This corrected the critic itself: it claimed ‚Äúno species column in the data model,‚Äù but inst/extdata/deidentified_jmac_ped.csv DOES carry a species column (+ latent multi-species intent: #36, agePyramidPlot.R:60). I published the narrower accurate fact in #45, not the absolute. Reading the core file myself surfaced the single most scope-shaping fact (‚Üí 72b): getPotentialParents already takes maxGestationalPeriod, applied sire-side only (:62) ‚Äî so #31 is ‚Äúextend the existing gestation quantity to the dam side,‚Äù not ‚Äúadd gestation fresh.‚Äù - Owner decisions (via AskUserQuestion, 3 questions): (Disposition) linking umbrella, BOTH #31+#28 kept OPEN (not dedup-closed); (Scope) narrow ‚Äî getPotentialParents candidate-selection only (species discriminator + #28 data model + #37 integration documented as out-of-scope deps/cross-links); (Gestation source) reuse/extend the existing maxGestationalPeriod, NO parallel parameter. Applied exactly as chosen. - The outward-facing work: created #45 (enhancement, body from /tmp/s73_umbrella_body.md) with the verified current-state map, the decided design, acceptance criteria, the two sub-tasks (#31 near-term low-lift; #28 deferred/data-dependent), and an explicit out-of-scope/cross-link section (#9 GVA, #37 integration, #36 species, #11/#12 data). Commented on #31 and #28 to link them to #45 as distinct sub-tasks. Verified: #45/#31/#28 all state=OPEN; open count 16 (was 15). - [news-vs-changelog] ‚Üí CHANGELOG only (S73 entry under [Unreleased]; issue consolidation = dev-process history, not a user-facing release note ‚Üí NOT NEWS.md; no BACKLOG.md file ‚Äî open work lives in GitHub Issues, nothing to prune). [macos-dupe-scan]: git add only SESSION_NOTES.md + CHANGELOG.md + PROJECT_LEARNINGS.md; the 2 standing untracked files (..Rcheck/, PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html) excluded + untouched.

What Session 71 Did

Deliverable: Implement GitHub issue #44 (full umbrella scope) and its #38 sub-task ‚Äî configurable auto-generated unknown-ID format (default "U%04d", byte-identical back-compat with no config) from a single source of truth: exported getAutoIdFormat()/setAutoIdFormat() + an internal isGeneratedUnknownId() predicate replacing all 7 detection literals across 4 files + 2 generators; case-handling reconciled to case-sensitive. (DONE ‚Äî feature shipped; #44 + #38 implemented + devtools::check()-green, awaiting owner confirm to close.) Started / Completed: 2026-06-13 Status: DONE. Code session under strict TDD: RED‚ÜíGREEN‚ÜíREFACTOR(skipped) ‚Äî all three transition gates posed via AskUserQuestion, plus a separate pre-RED scope/approach decision (3 questions). TDD phase declared atop every response. 0 stakeholder corrections. One close-out commit on add-methodology. - Owner decisions (pre-RED, via AskUserQuestion, 3 questions): (Scope) full #44; (Detection) prefix-only, byte-identical (startsWith(id, <literal prefix before first %>) ‚Äî preserves today‚Äôs exact matching, incl.¬Ýthe existing over-match of real prefix-IDs); (Case rule) case-sensitive (match generation‚Äôs uppercase prefix; reconciles reportGV+obfuscateId, which were insensitive). All applied exactly as chosen. - Recompute-don‚Äôt-inherit (Learning 70 applied to a feature): re-read the 8 load-bearing files firsthand to verify S70‚Äôs subsystem map against the working tree BEFORE declaring RED ‚Äî confirmed the 2 generators + 7 detection sites + the case-divergence, rather than trusting the handoff. - Evidence-based decision aid (‚Üí Learning 71b): grepped the test corpus and found the lowercase "u001" in test_obfuscateId.R:28 ‚Äî the exact datum that makes ‚Äúreconcile case-sensitivity‚Äù a concrete, test-breaking fork. The case-rule AskUserQuestion cited that specific test, so the owner chose against evidence. - New code: R/autoIdFormat.R ‚Äî getAutoIdFormat() = getOption("nprcgenekeepr.autoIdFormat", "U%04d") + setAutoIdFormat(format) (validates: single non-NA char, non-empty literal prefix, sprintf-template-consuming-one-integer; returns previous invisibly) [both exported]; internal getAutoIdPrefix() + isGeneratedUnknownId() (case-sensitive, NA-preserving like the startsWith/stri_sub it replaces ‚Üí a true drop-in) [@noRd]. - Threaded through (all 7 literals + 2 generators centralized): addUIds(ped, format = getAutoIdFormat()) mints via sprintf(format, ‚Ä¶) (‚â° default); obfuscateId mints with getAutoIdPrefix() + size - nchar(prefix) and guards via the predicate; removeAutoGenIds (√ó3), modPedigree.R:290 display filter, reportGV.R:137-140 founder counts all route detection through the single predicate. removeAutoGenIds‚Äôs ‚Äúuse a function call‚Äù TODO resolved (docstring updated). qcStudbook unchanged (its addUIds(sb) picks up the option via the default ‚Äî smallest blast radius). modPedigree.R:112 tooltip notes configurability. - TDD trail (RED‚ÜíGREEN): RED wrote 2 NEW test files (test_autoIdFormat.R, test_removeAutoGenIds.R) + edited test_obfuscateId.R:27-32 to the case-sensitive contract, and confirmed red (new fns undefined ‚Üí error; obfuscate test fails vs current insensitive code). GREEN: the new file + 5 edits + devtools::document(). Only ONE existing test changed (test_obfuscateId); test_addUIds/test_qcStudbook/test_modPedigree pass UNCHANGED = the byte-identical back-compat proof (‚Üí Learning 71a). - Verification: Full suite 0 failed / 0 error / 159 skip (985 results; the 5 warnings are pre-existing test_modPyramid.R baseline). devtools::check() exit 0, 1 NOTE ‚Äî the spelling.R comparison vs a stale spelling.Rout.save; attributed to pre-existing baseline (spell_check_package + check word list flag 0 of my identifiers among 54 words ‚Üí not introduced/worsened; left as housekeeping, ‚Üí Learning 71d). Lint clean under load_all (the options() setter carries # nolint: undesirable_function_linter per the getPyramidPlot.R precedent ‚Äî a public permanent setter). Exhaustive grep confirmed no remaining auto-ID "U" literal in R/ (only the unrelated sex-factor level M/F/U/H). [news-vs-changelog] ‚Üí BOTH (user-facing feature): NEWS.md NEW-48 + CHANGELOG.md S71 under [Unreleased].

Phase-3E (runtime smoke test): DONE via the test suite. The runtime-behavior changes ‚Äî the modPedigreeServer displayUnknownIds filter (:290) and reportGV() founder counts ‚Äî are exercised by test_modPedigree*/reportGV tests within the green suite (testServer-level verification, same basis as S68). The new public API is a pure option get/set, tested directly in test_autoIdFormat.R. No separate interactive runModularApp() launch needed.

Session 70 Handoff Evaluation (by Session 71): Score 9/10. S70 pre-named AND fully spec‚Äôd THIS deliverable as SUGGESTED-NEXT candidate (1): the exact work (configurable default-preserving format, the isGeneratedUnknownId() predicate replacing the literals, get/setAutoIdFormat, case reconciliation, test updates) AND the three ‚Äúhere be dragons‚Äù ‚Äî byte-identical back-compat, case-sensitivity reconciliation, and ‚ÄúobfuscateId is a second generator that‚Äôs easy to miss.‚Äù All three dragons were the REAL load-bearing risks (byte-identical was criterion #1; case reconciliation forced the one test change; obfuscateId‚Äôs mint genuinely needed special handling). #44 itself (S70‚Äôs artifact) carried the firsthand current-state map, acceptance criteria, the ‚Äútests that bake in U‚Äù list, and an explicit out-of-scope section ‚Äî every anchor (addUIds.R:47,54, obfuscateId.R:38-43, the 7 sites, getRecordStatusIndex as the model, the qcStudbook ordering) held firsthand. The gotchas were load-bearing and correct: gotcha #3 (second producer) shaped my GREEN; gotcha #2 (U-prefix-only scope) kept me from widening; gotcha #5 (gh issue view --json) I used. I spent ~zero time discovering what to do or where the risks were. The ‚àí1: #44‚Äôs ‚Äútests that bake in U ‚Ä¶ will need updating‚Äù listed four test files, but only one actually needed changing ‚Äî under the byte-identical default the other three pass unchanged (which is itself the back-compat proof). A conservative over-count in the safe direction, but it slightly mis-framed the blast radius. No inaccuracies that cost time. ROI: very high ‚Äî best-prepared handoff in the recent chain.

Documented as gotcha #3. A clean, fully-verified, 0-correction feature with new exported API + man pages + NEWS + 2 new test files + green check() ‚Üí honest 9.

Gotchas: (1) #44 + #38 are IMPLEMENTED but still OPEN ‚Äî close (with a commit pointer) only on owner confirm; feature is done + check-green = a clean close candidate (17 ‚Üí 15), not re-verification. (2) Single source of truth = getOption("nprcgenekeepr.autoIdFormat", "U%04d") via getAutoIdFormat()/setAutoIdFormat(); detection = getAutoIdPrefix() (literal before first %) + startsWith, case-SENSITIVE, NA-preserving. (3) Prefix-only detection still over-matches real IDs starting with the prefix (e.g.¬Ý‚ÄúUlysses‚Äù) ‚Äî SAME as before (byte-identical, by owner choice). removeAutoGenIds‚Äôs TODO is satisfied only in letter (centralized function call); its deeper ‚Äúreal U-prefixed IDs possible‚Äù goal is NOT achieved and would require the declined prefix+digits option (^prefix[0-9]+$). (4) Case reconciliation: reportGV+obfuscateId are now case-SENSITIVE (were insensitive) ‚Äî test_obfuscateId.R:27-32 updated accordingly (lowercase "u001" ‚Üí real ID); a real lowercase-"u" animal ID is now treated as real everywhere (the intended fix). (5) Out-of-scope conventions untouched ‚Äî textual "UNKNOWN" (unknown2NA), recordStatus (addParents/getRecordStatusIndex); don‚Äôt widen into them. (6) Pre-existing spelling NOTE ‚Äî devtools::check() yields 1 NOTE (spelling.R vs stale spelling.Rout.save); 0 of my words flagged; housekeeping candidate, not this session‚Äôs regression. (7) obfuscateId mint uses size - nchar(prefix) ‚Äî a multi-char configured prefix needs size > nchar(prefix). (8) setAutoIdFormat() uses options() permanently (it IS the public setter) ‚Äî carries # nolint: undesirable_function_linter; do not ‚Äúfix‚Äù to withr::with_options. (9) CLAUDE.md still says ‚ÄúVersion 1.0.8‚Äù (DESCRIPTION 1.1.0.9000) ‚Äî stale, carried since S56. (10) The 2 untracked files remain ‚Äî build-ignored / owner‚Äôs standing keep-call. What Session 70 Did

Deliverable: Consolidate the ID cluster ‚Äî GitHub issues #26 / #32 / #38 (auto-generated unknown-ID format/detection) ‚Äî into one umbrella design issue, grounded in a firsthand subsystem map, with a decided disposition for the three originals. (DONE ‚Äî umbrella #44 created OPEN; #26 + #32 CLOSED as duplicates; #38 kept OPEN + linked. Open issues 18 ‚Üí 17.) Started / Completed: 2026-06-13 Status: DONE. Grooming/design session (no production code or tests; TDD phase = N/A declared every response ‚Äî same non-code classification as S57/S61‚ÄìS67/S69). One close-out commit on add-methodology. No R/, tests/, man/, .lintr, or NEWS.md changes. - Firsthand subsystem map (Workflow under ultracode): ran a 2-phase workflow ‚Äî phase 1: 4 parallel facet readers (generation / detection / callers-config / tests); phase 2: an adversarial completeness critic fed the combined inventory. The critic earned its keep: it overturned the mappers‚Äô claims that addUIds is ‚Äúthe only synthesizer‚Äù and that ‚Äúno centralized predicate exists,‚Äù surfacing that the ID cluster spans three independent unknown/auto-gen conventions coupled only by ordering in qcStudbook.R:188‚Üí198‚Üí199 (unknown2NA ‚Üí addUIds ‚Üí addParents): (1) textual "UNKNOWN" (unknown2NA.R, case-insensitive); (2) the "U%04d" prefix ‚Äî 2 producers (addUIds.R:47,54 + obfuscateId.R:38-43) and 7 detection sites in 4 files with inconsistent case-handling (stri_sub/startsWith sensitive vs grepl("^U", ignore.case=TRUE)), no centralized predicate; (3) recordStatus="added" (addParents.R:43-61) with the already-centralized getRecordStatusIndex() predicate (the model #2 should imitate). - Verify-before-publish (the load-bearing discipline): before the irreversible/outward-facing actions, re-read the 8 load-bearing files firsthand (addUIds, removeAutoGenIds, addParents, getRecordStatusIndex, obfuscateId, unknown2NA, the qcStudbook ordering, the modPedigree.R:112 tooltip) to confirm the three-convention thesis + the two-generator claim in source ‚Äî did NOT publish subagent findings unverified (‚Üí Learning 70). - Owner decisions surfaced via AskUserQuestion (after the owner asked to clarify the first pass and steered ‚ÄúU default, configurable other prefix‚Äù): (Configurable) prefix + number format, default "U%04d"; (Scope) the "U"-prefix convention only (textual-UNKNOWN + recordStatus documented as out-of-scope); (Originals) close #26 + #32 as duplicates, keep #38; (Form) umbrella issue only (no docs/ note, since scope is narrow). Applied exactly as chosen. - The outward-facing work: created #44 (enhancement) with the verified current-state map, a single-source-of-truth design (getAutoIdFormat()/setAutoIdFormat() per #38 + an internal isGeneratedUnknownId() predicate replacing the 8 literals + case-sensitivity reconciliation), acceptance criteria (byte-identical back-compat with no config; a non-default-format generate‚Üídetect round-trip test; removeAutoGenIds has no unit test today ‚Üí add one), the ‚ÄúU‚Äù-baking tests, and an explicit out-of-scope section. Closed #26 + #32 (--reason "not planned") with comments pointing to #44; commented on #38 to link it. Verified: #44 OPEN; #26/#32 state=CLOSED, closed=true; #38 OPEN; open count 17. - [news-vs-changelog] ‚Üí CHANGELOG only (S70 entry under [Unreleased]; issue consolidation = dev-process history, not a user-facing release note ‚Üí NOT NEWS.md; no BACKLOG.md file exists ‚Äî open work lives in GitHub Issues, nothing to prune). [macos-dupe-scan]: will git add only SESSION_NOTES.md + CHANGELOG.md + PROJECT_LEARNINGS.md; the 2 standing untracked files (..Rcheck/, PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html) excluded + untouched. - Honest correction logged: my AskUserQuestion ‚ÄúOriginals‚Äù option copy said closing 2 = ‚Äú18 ‚Üí 16‚Äù ‚Äî it forgot the umbrella is itself a new open issue, so the true net is 18 ‚Üí 17. Caught at verification, corrected in the issue list + here.

Phase-3E (runtime smoke test): N/A and stated ‚Äî no runtime behavior changed (created/closed GitHub issues + edited build-ignored docs; no R/ code). The current-state facts #44 documents were read directly off the working-tree source (the 8 files above), not a stale install.

Gotchas: (1) #35 is now CLOSED (completed) ‚Äî don‚Äôt re-open or re-verify; the close comment maps shipped code to its acceptance criteria. (2) getDescendantPedigree is the descendants-only primitive ‚Äî getProbandPedigree=ancestors(up), getDescendantPedigree=descendants(down), getPedDirectRelatives=both+collaterals, getOffspring/getParents=single-level. (3) The trim is strict-lineal by design ‚Äî a displayed descendant‚Äôs other parent (mate) is intentionally NOT pulled in; that is the approved Option-A semantics, not a bug. (4) CLAUDE.md still says ‚ÄúVersion 1.0.8‚Äù (DESCRIPTION is 1.1.0.9000) ‚Äî stale, carried since S56; candidate (4) above. (5) The 2 untracked files remain ‚Äî build-ignored / owner‚Äôs standing keep-call. (6) No BACKLOG.md file exists ‚Äî open work lives in GitHub Issues, not a backlog doc. ‚ü¢ Carried ‚Äî Session 68 (implement #35 descendants, DONE; full detail below):

What Session 68 Did

Deliverable: Implement GitHub issue #35 ‚Äî include descendants in the Pedigree Browser‚Äôs ‚ÄúTrim pedigree‚Äù filtering (ancestor-inclusion was already done per S67). Strict TDD, Option A (strict lineal) per owner. (DONE ‚Äî feature shipped; #35 implemented, awaiting owner confirm to close.) Started / Completed: 2026-06-13 Status: DONE. First real code session after the S57‚ÄìS67 non-code run ‚Üí genuine RED‚ÜíGREEN‚ÜíREFACTOR(skipped) with all three phase gates posed via AskUserQuestion, plus a separate pre-RED Option A/B approach decision. 0 stakeholder corrections. One close-out commit pending on add-methodology. - The approach (owner-chosen via AskUserQuestion, pre-RED): Option A ‚Äî strict lineal. Trimmed pedigree = focal ‚à™ transitive ancestors ‚à™ transitive descendants; no collaterals (siblings/cousins/mates). (Option B = reuse getPedDirectRelatives, which adds collaterals = whole connected pedigree ‚Äî declined.) - New code: R/getDescendantPedigree.R ‚Äî new exported transitive-offspring closure (repeat { getOffspring ‚Üí break when nothing new }), the downward mirror of getProbandPedigree. R/modPedigree.R:292-307 ‚Äî trim block now unions the ancestor closure (trimPedigree(probands, ped, removeUninformative=FALSE, addBackParents=FALSE)) with the new descendant closure: ped <- ped[ped$id %in% union(ancestors$id, descendants$id), ]. UI help text (:124-126) changed from the ‚Äúinclude only relatives‚Äù over-promise S67 flagged ‚Üí ‚Äúthe ancestors and descendants of the focal animals‚Äù; docstring (:166-167) updated to match. - TDD trail (RED then GREEN): RED wrote 9 failing assertions and CONFIRMED red ‚Äî test_getDescendantPedigree.R errored (could not find function) + the 2 new integration tests failed ("GC" %in% ped$id false under ancestors-only). GREEN: created the helper + union edit + docstring/help-text + devtools::document() (man page + NAMESPACE export) + NEWS.md NEW-47. - The regression catch (‚Üí Learning 68): the full-suite clean-regression read surfaced a SECOND stale test in a different file ‚Äî test_modPedigree.R:419 (‚Äútrims pedigree based on focal animals‚Äù) asserted the OLD ancestors-only result (nrow==3, expect_false("D")) for focal {A,C}; D is a child of focal A ‚Üí now a correctly-included descendant. Updated it to the new contract (nrow==4, {A,B,C,D} in, half-sib E still out) with reasoning. I‚Äôd only updated the obvious _processing file in RED; the regression read (CLAUDE.md Build/Test/Verify) is the backstop that caught the one RED missed. - Verification: Full suite 972 tests / 0 failed / 0 error / 159 skip. Lint clean ‚Äî the lone object_usage_linter warning (‚Äúno visible global function definition for ‚ÄògetDescendantPedigree‚Äô‚Äù) proven an install-staleness artifact: 0 warnings once linted with pkgload::load_all() (resolves against installed namespace; the new fn is dev-only until reinstall). [news-vs-changelog] ‚Üí BOTH (user-facing feature): NEWS.md NEW-47 + CHANGELOG.md S68 under [Unreleased]. BACKLOG.md has no #35/descendant ref (grep-verified ‚Äî nothing to prune).

Phase-3E (runtime smoke test): DONE via shiny::testServer. The deliverable changes the modPedigreeServer pedigreeData reactive ‚Äî the 2 integration tests in test_modPedigree_processing.R (+ the updated test_modPedigree.R trim test) drive that exact reactive through the real server pipeline (processedPedigree ‚Üí trim union) and confirm the new behavior is active (descendant GC included, collaterals C/E excluded). That is the deterministic runtime verification for a Shiny-module change; no separate interactive runModularApp() browser launch was needed (testServer exercises the changed code path directly).

Its gotchas held: trimPedigree has no ancestors=/descendants= params (true); the UI help text over-promises ‚Äúrelatives‚Äù (true ‚Äî I fixed it); the direction cheat-sheet (exact). Key files (this session): NEW R/getDescendantPedigree.R (exported transitive-offspring closure) + man/getDescendantPedigree.Rd + tests/testthat/test_getDescendantPedigree.R (6 unit tests). CHANGED R/modPedigree.R (trim union :292-307; help text :124-126; docstring :166-167), man/modPedigreeServer.Rd (regenerated), NAMESPACE (+export), NEWS.md (NEW-47), tests/testthat/test_modPedigree_processing.R (+2 integration tests), tests/testthat/test_modPedigree.R (:419 trim test updated to new contract). Gotchas: (1) #35 is IMPLEMENTED but still OPEN ‚Äî close it (with a commit pointer) only on owner confirm; the feature is done + suite-green, so this is a clean close candidate, not re-verification work. (2) getDescendantPedigree is the new descendants-only primitive ‚Äî getProbandPedigree=ancestors(up), getDescendantPedigree=descendants(down), getPedDirectRelatives=both+collaterals, getOffspring/getParents=single-level. (3) The trim is strict-lineal by design ‚Äî a displayed descendant‚Äôs other parent (mate) is intentionally NOT pulled in, so the trimmed table can show an animal whose sire/dam isn‚Äôt a row; that is the approved Option-A semantics, not a bug. (4) object_usage_linter will warn on getDescendantPedigree until the package is reinstalled ‚Äî it‚Äôs an install-staleness artifact (0 warnings under load_all); don‚Äôt ‚Äúfix‚Äù it. (5) A behavior-change feature can break tests in files you didn‚Äôt touch ‚Äî grep the test corpus for the changed behavior during RED (Learning 68); the clean-regression read is the backstop. (6) CLAUDE.md still says ‚ÄúVersion 1.0.8‚Äù (DESCRIPTION is 1.1.0.9000) ‚Äî stale, carried since S56. (7) The 2 untracked files remain ‚Äî build-ignored / owner‚Äôs standing keep-call. Branch model unchanged: this close-out is on add-methodology; master gets it on the next sync/PR (S51 promoted prior work via PR #41).

‚ü¢ Carried ‚Äî Session 67 (re-scope #35 to descendants, DONE; full detail below): Task (Session 67 ‚Äî 2026-06-13): Execute S66 SUGGESTED-NEXT #1 ‚Äî re-scope GitHub issue #35 (‚ÄúInclude ancestors and descendants in pedigree filtering‚Äù) to focus on the remaining descendants work, after firsthand-verifying that ancestor-inclusion is implemented and descendant-inclusion is not. (DONE ‚Äî #35 re-scoped + retitled, kept OPEN.) Started / Completed: 2026-06-13 Status: DONE. Issue-grooming / re-scope session (no production code or tests written; TDD phase = N/A declared every response ‚Äî same non-code classification S57/S61‚ÄìS66 used). One close-out commit on add-methodology. No R/, tests/, man/, .lintr, or NEWS.md changes. - The finding (firsthand ‚Äî confirmed the handoff directionally, added the depth it couldn‚Äôt): #35‚Äôs compound ‚Äúancestors AND descendants‚Äù ask is half done. Ancestors DONE ‚Äî R/modPedigree.R:292-302: when the ‚ÄúTrim pedigree based on focal animals‚Äù checkbox is on, it calls trimPedigree(probands, ped, removeUninformative = FALSE, addBackParents = FALSE) ‚Üí getProbandPedigree() (R/getProbandPedigree.R:24-40), an upward sire/dam closure (ancestors only). The module docstring already says so (R/modPedigree.R:166: ‚ÄúOptionally trimming to ancestors‚Ä¶‚Äù). Descendants NOT ‚Äî neither trimPedigree nor getProbandPedigree walks downward; getOffspring() is single-level only. - Two stale references the inherited framing did NOT flag (caught firsthand): (1) the issue‚Äôs cited ‚ÄúCurrent Code‚Äù (lines 246-253, a # TODO: Include ancestors and descendants placeholder) no longer exists ‚Äî replaced by the live ancestor logic at 292-302; (2) its ‚ÄúSuggested Implementation‚Äù called trimPedigree(focalIds(), ped, ancestors = TRUE, descendants = TRUE) ‚Äî that signature does not exist (trimPedigree(probands, ped, removeUninformative, addBackParents)). Copying the suggested call forward would have handed the implementer a non-compiling spec (‚Üí Learning 67(a)). - The semantic fork surfaced (not silently picked): ‚Äúinclude descendants‚Äù has two non-equivalent implementations ‚Äî (A) strict lineal: add a downward closure mirroring getProbandPedigree‚Äôs loop (repeated getOffspring() to closure), union with the ancestor set = focal‚Äôs ancestors+descendants only; (B) reuse getPedDirectRelatives() (R/getPedDirectRelatives.R:46-59), which already loops getParents() AND getOffspring() to closure but thereby also pulls in collateral relatives (sibs/cousins/mates) = the whole connected pedigree, broader than lineal. The package has the both-directions primitive but no transitive descendants-only helper. - Applied (owner-chosen via AskUserQuestion, 2 questions): FORM = rewrite the body + retitle to ‚ÄúInclude descendants in pedigree filtering (ancestors already implemented)‚Äù + dated verification comment; SCOPE = document BOTH options as an open design choice (left for the implementation session). Did gh issue edit 35 --title ‚Ä¶ --body-file + gh issue comment 35 (comment #issuecomment-4699260833). Issue kept OPEN. - Verified the edit landed: title updated + state: open re-read via gh api; 5 grep checks on the saved body all PASS (cites live 292-302; notes the non-existent ancestors=,descendants= API; both Option A + Option B present; references getPedDirectRelatives; notes the stale 246-253 placeholder is gone). Also noted the UI help text already over-promises (‚Äú‚Ä¶include only relatives of the focal animals‚Äù, R/modPedigree.R:125) while behavior is ancestors-only ‚Äî flagged in the body as a label-alignment item. - [news-vs-changelog] ‚Üí CHANGELOG only (S67 entry under [Unreleased]; dev-process/grooming history, not a user-facing release note ‚Üí NOT NEWS.md; BACKLOG.md has no #35 / descendants reference ‚Äî verified by grep, nothing to prune). [macos-dupe-scan]: explicit git add of only SESSION_NOTES.md + CHANGELOG.md + PROJECT_LEARNINGS.md (excluded the 2 pre-existing untracked: ..Rcheck/, PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html).

Phase-3E (runtime smoke test): N/A and stated ‚Äî no runtime behavior changed (edited a GitHub issue + build-ignored docs; no R/ code). The runtime facts the re-scope documents ARE verified, though: the ancestors-done / descendants-not partition was read directly off the live call chain in the working-tree source (modPedigree.R ‚Üí trimPedigree ‚Üí getProbandPedigree; getOffspring/getParents/getPedDirectRelatives), not from a stale install.

No R/, tests/, man/, .lintr, or NEWS.md changes.

Gotchas: (1) #35 is RE-SCOPED + OPEN (not closed) ‚Äî title now ‚ÄúInclude descendants in pedigree filtering (ancestors already implemented)‚Äù. Ancestors are DONE ‚Äî don‚Äôt re-verify/re-implement them; the remaining work is descendants only. (2) The implementation has a documented FORK (A strict-lineal vs B getPedDirectRelatives) ‚Äî the owner must pick before a code session; they are NOT equivalent (B adds siblings/cousins/mates). (3) trimPedigree has NO ancestors=/descendants= params ‚Äî its real signature is (probands, ped, removeUninformative, addBackParents); do not write code assuming the issue‚Äôs old suggested API. (4) Direction cheat-sheet: getProbandPedigree = ancestors-only (up); getPedDirectRelatives = up+down to closure incl.¬Ýcollaterals; getOffspring/getParents = single-level. There is no transitive descendants-only helper ‚Äî Option A must add one. (5) The UI help text over-promises (‚Äúinclude only relatives‚Äù, R/modPedigree.R:125) vs ancestors-only behavior ‚Äî align it when implementing. (6) CLAUDE.md still says ‚ÄúVersion 1.0.8‚Äù (DESCRIPTION is 1.1.0.9000) ‚Äî stale, carried since S56. (7) The 2 untracked files (..Rcheck/, PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html) remain ‚Äî build-ignored / owner‚Äôs standing keep-call; left untouched. Branch model unchanged: this close-out is on add-methodology; master gets it on the next sync/PR (S51 promoted prior work via PR #41).
