Self-assessment (Session 53): 9/10. Oriented fully (SAFEGUARDS + SESSION_RUNNER in full, session-notes top, dashboard, git, issues) before any work; claimed the session with a stub BEFORE technical work (Phase 1B). Correctly classified this as a planning session (deliverable = plan doc, not fixes) per the user‚Äôs word ‚Äúplan‚Äù + FM #18/#19 ‚Äî did NOT bleed into implementation. Research before creative work: read .lintr, issue #30, the lint Learnings (#7 [lint-net-zero], [stale-namespace]) BEFORE building the inventory. Verified, didn‚Äôt assume ‚Äî the load-bearing discipline this session: built the inventory from a firsthand parse_settings=FALSE reproduction (not the agents‚Äô headlines), and when an examine-agent‚Äôs ‚Äústale‚Äù claim contradicted my repro I chased it to root cause (the parse_settings=TRUE auditing trap) and proved the truth (the source symbol IS flagged) rather than trusting either side. Used adversarial verification as designed ‚Äî it overturned the makeGeneticDiversityDashboard-delete and set_seed-stale recommendations, both of which would have been real defects in the plan (one reversing an author decision, one a non-fix). Right-sized the orchestration: a parallel per-file workflow for 18 independent examinations + a deterministic R reproduction for the authoritative counts (the script IS the proof, not an agent). Evidence-based inventory with exact line numbers + per-phase completion criteria + here-be-dragons (SESSION_RUNNER planning-session requirements all met). Stakeholder corrections: 0. Minor dings: (a) I did not post the plan as an issue-#30 comment (deferred ‚Äî the plan lives on add-methodology, not yet on master; left as a handoff option rather than presuming); (b) the plan defers 4 genuine author decisions (esp.¬Ýthe implicit_integer disable-vs-fix and the addSexAndAgeToGroup approach) to implementation-time AskUserQuestion rather than resolving them now ‚Äî correct for a plan, but it means P4/P5 each open with a gate. Met/exceeded the S47‚ÄìS52 bar.

‚áí SUGGESTED NEXT = IMPLEMENT Phase 1 of the #30 plan (docs/planning/issue30-lintr-exclusion-cleanup-plan.md ¬ß5 Phase 1 ‚Äî comment/doc-only cleanup + config hygiene: getErrorTab.R, get_elapsed_time_str.R, print.summary.nprcgenekeeprErr.R, set_seed.R strip #'; remove those 4 exclusions + the dead #commented_code_linter = NULL line; KEEP makeGeneticDiversityDashboard). It is the safest slice (behavior-none), a single clean session, and ends with man/set_seed.Rd regenerated (devtools::document() after the #' strip). TDD shape: REFACTOR (comments only; existing tests guard) ‚Äî declare the phase, no new tests needed. Verification (plan ¬ß8): lint the touched files with parse_settings=FALSE ‚Üí 0; lint_package(".") residual drops; devtools::check() clean. Then P2 ‚Üí P3 ‚Üí P4 ‚Üí (optional) P5, one per session, in order (safest-first). ‚öÝ Here be dragons (plan ¬ß6) ‚Äî read BEFORE touching any file: (1) do NOT delete makeGeneticDiversityDashboard.R (author won‚Äôt-delete, NEW-20); (2) set_seed.R:11 is NOT a stale exclusion ‚Äî strip the #'; (3) getLkDirectAncestors.R:26/29/35 is NOT stale ‚Äî rename the local source var (verify with parse_settings=FALSE, never plain lint()); (4) addSexAndAgeToGroup.R:21 (P4) is the only real behavior risk ‚Äî exported, use match() + a RED contract test; (5) ALWAYS fix-code-and-delete-the-exclusion in the SAME commit ([lint-net-zero] ‚Äî no stale line numbers). Key files: the plan itself (full inventory + exact fixes per file in ¬ß4, phases in ¬ß5, verification in ¬ß8, author decisions in ¬ß9); .lintr:14-37 (the exclusions); /tmp/lint_all_R.csv + /tmp/lint_current_R.csv (this session‚Äôs lint dumps ‚Äî TRANSIENT, regenerate via the ¬ß1 commands if needed). Author decisions deferred to implementation (plan ¬ß9): implicit_integer disable-vs-fix (74 lints; recommend disable), the addSexAndAgeToGroup approach, and whether to close #30 after P4 or drive to a fully-green lint_package(). Branch model unchanged: this close-out is on add-methodology (the historical dev branch); master will get it on the next sync/PR.

‚ü¢ Carried ‚Äî Session 52 (fix #42 pkgdown, DONE; full detail below): Task (Session 52 ‚Äî 2026-06-11): FIX issue #42 ‚Äî the pkgdown workflow‚Äôs Build-site step fails on master because docs/methodology/ + docs/planning/ are git-tracked INSIDE pkgdown‚Äôs default docs/ output dir, so a fresh CI clone‚Äôs docs/ holds those files + NO pkgdown.yml sentinel ‚Üí clean_site()/check_dest_is_pkgdown() refuses to wipe a dir it didn‚Äôt build ‚Üí exit 1. Deliverable = make pkgdown go GREEN on master. (DONE) Started: 2026-06-11 Status: DONE ‚Äî pkgdown is GREEN on master (run 27362288625, commit c6ad23dd: Build site SUCCESS + Deploy SUCCESS); #42 CLOSED. Chose Option 2 (repoint pkgdown), NOT the issue‚Äôs recommended Option 1 (relocate the doc trees) ‚Äî surfaced the override via AskUserQuestion because Option 1 conflicts with the methodology framework‚Äôs own docs/methodology/ convention: the SYNCED methodology_dashboard.py:109-110 scores docs/methodology+docs/methodology/workstreams (20 of the 98 health pts) and the SYNCED SESSION_RUNNER.md (13 refs) + SAFEGUARDS.md (1 ref) cross-link that path ‚Äî none durably editable in-repo (re-synced from upstream). Load-bearing pkgdown internal (verified from installed pkgdown 2.1.1 source + empirically): build_site_github_pages() does as_pkgdown(pkg, override = list(destination = dest_dir)), so its dest_dir="docs" ARG overrides any _pkgdown.yml destination: ‚Üí setting the yml ALONE does NOT fix CI (owner proposed the yml; I confirmed it‚Äôs necessary-but-insufficient and set BOTH). Fix (commit fcc154e8): .github/workflows/pkgdown.yaml ‚Äî pass dest_dir="pkgdown_site" to build_site_github_pages + deploy folder: docs ‚Üí pkgdown_site; _pkgdown.yml ‚Äî destination: pkgdown_site (keeps local build_site() consistent); .gitignore += pkgdown_site/; .Rbuildignore += ^pkgdown_site$. NO file moves; docs/methodology/docs/planning/dashboard/synced cross-refs untouched; gh-pages URL unchanged. NO R/ or tests/ change ‚Üí suite byte-identical, R-CMD-check unaffected (stayed green on all 5 platforms on the PR). Local proof BEFORE pushing: simulated the fresh-clone state in a temp package skeleton ‚Üí clean_site(dest=docs) ERRORS ‚Äúis non-empty and not built by pkgdown‚Äù (reproduces #42); clean_site(dest=pkgdown_site) = clean no-op. The fix UNMASKED a separate pre-existing latent bug (FM-#24-cousin: clean_site was the FIRST of two failures): with clean_site resolved the build reached vignette rendering and failed on ColonyManagerTutorial.Rmd:209-229 chunk make-errorList-definition-tbl ‚Äî data.frame(Error=names(getEmptyErrorLst()), Definition=errorDescriptions) paired 10 error types vs 9 hardcoded descriptions (‚Äúarguments imply differing number of rows: 10, 9‚Äù). Root cause: the NEW-45 ‚Äúno period in IDs‚Äù feature (commit 5e228bd9) added the invalidIdChars type to getEmptyErrorLst() without updating this vignette table. Owner chose (via AskUserQuestion) to fix the vignette too (vs file-separately) ‚Üí added the missing invalidIdChars description in positional order (after duplicateIds, before changedCols) using the package‚Äôs canonical wording, commit e89975c8. Why latent / why R-CMD-check was green but pkgdown red: ColonyManagerTutorial.Rmd is .Rbuildignore‚Äôd (:36) ‚Äî R CMD build/check NEVER builds it (likely excluded for CRAN tarball-size/time: it reads screenshots from the also-.Rbuildignore‚Äôd vignettes/shiny_app_use/), but pkgdown builds vignettes from the source tree, ignoring .Rbuildignore, so it was the ONE pkgdown-built vignette R-CMD-check doesn‚Äôt cover ‚Üí the only place a render bug could hide (the other 3 ‚Äî a2interactive, a3manual, simulatedKValues ‚Äî ARE check-built ‚Üí green ‚Üí render fine). Validation chain (all firsthand): PR #43 pkgdown run 27361729368 (fresh-clone, pull_request, Deploy skipped) = SUCCESS, all 4 vignettes rendered; merged PR #43 --merge ‚Üí master c6ad23dd; master push run 27362288625 = Build site SUCCESS + Deploy SUCCESS (exercises the new folder: pkgdown_site ‚Üí gh-pages). #42 auto-closed on merge (PR body ‚ÄúFixes #42‚Äù) + added a validation comment (#42 issuecomment-4682879576). Phase-3E = the live master pkgdown run itself (real fresh runner, real build+deploy). Commits on add-methodology: fcc154e8 (config fix) + e89975c8 (vignette fix) + this close-out (SESSION_NOTES + CHANGELOG + PROJECT_LEARNINGS #52), explicit git add ([macos-dupe-scan]: .DS_Store/..Rcheck//PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html excluded). [news-vs-changelog] ‚Üí CHANGELOG only.

Session 51 Handoff Evaluation (by Session 52): Score 9/10. What helped: S51‚Äôs handoff named #42 as the suggested next with the EXACT root cause (docs/methodology+docs/planning tracked in pkgdown‚Äôs docs/ ‚Üí no sentinel ‚Üí clean_site refuses), the 3 fix options + Option-1 recommendation, the precise key files (.gitignore:32-36, _pkgdown.yml ‚Äúno destination ‚Üí defaults to docs/‚Äù, .github/workflows/pkgdown.yaml), and the gotchas (a) R-CMD-check GREEN ‚Äî don‚Äôt mistake the pkgdown red for a package-correctness problem, (b) lint #30 + codecov independent of #42. All of (a)/(b) held and saved triage time. What was missing (the ding, and the reason I diverged from the recommendation): S51 recommended Option 1 without weighing that the methodology framework PINS reference docs to docs/methodology/ (synced dashboard scoring + synced SESSION_RUNNER/SAFEGUARDS cross-refs) ‚Äî so Option 1 would break things I can‚Äôt durably fix; and it didn‚Äôt anticipate the LATENT vignette bug behind the clean_site failure (it couldn‚Äôt ‚Äî that was invisible until clean_site was resolved). What was wrong: nothing factual; the Option-1 rec was sound on its face but superseded by the synced-convention constraint, which I surfaced. ROI: very high.

Self-assessment (Session 52): 9/10. Research before action: oriented fully (SAFEGUARDS + SESSION_RUNNER in full, session-notes top, dashboard, git, issues), then read the issue, the sync mechanism (no bin/sync in-repo ‚Üí external tooling I can‚Äôt inspect ‚Üí makes the relocate-vs-repoint choice genuinely owner-gated), the full 17-file reference inventory classified synced-vs-owned, and the pkgdown internals (read build_site_github_pages source AND empirically proved the dest_dir override) BEFORE proposing a fix. Verified, didn‚Äôt assume: proved the fix with a faithful fresh-clone SIMULATION locally (reproduced the exact #42 error, showed the fix is a no-op) THEN with a real fresh-clone CI run, then with the master push (Build+Deploy). Did NOT silently follow OR silently override the owner‚Äôs written Option-1 recommendation ‚Äî surfaced the synced-convention conflict + the pkgdown override via AskUserQuestion with exact actions spelled out. Honored the owner‚Äôs mid-stream correction (the yml destination) precisely ‚Äî confirmed it necessary-but-insufficient and set both yml + workflow arg. When the fix unmasked a SECOND bug, did NOT scope-creep silently ‚Äî surfaced it (root-caused to NEW-45, characterized the whack-a-mole risk + the .Rbuildignore reason it was latent) and let the owner choose to fix-or-defer. Stakeholder decisions posed: 4 (fix-approach, merge, vignette-scope, plus honoring the yml correction) ‚Äî all answered as posed; 0 corrections. Minor ding: a truly exhaustive pre-push audit might have rendered all 4 vignettes locally to catch the ColonyManagerTutorial bug before the first CI cycle (I judged local render unreliable vs CI‚Äôs fresh local::. install ‚Äî defensible, but it cost one CI round-trip). Met/exceeded the S47‚ÄìS51 bar.

‚áí SUGGESTED NEXT = #30 (lintr cleanup) ‚Äî the last standing CI red. With #42 closed, the pkgdown workflow is GREEN on master; the ONLY remaining red across the CI matrix is lint (issue #30, known/accepted style debt ‚Äî it failed on PR #43 as expected). Greening lint would make the entire master CI matrix green. It‚Äôs an enhancement-labeled cleanup (lintr until satisfied), naturally incremental. Other standing backlog candidates unchanged: #34 (integrate qcStudbook() in modInput, bug), #38/#32/#26 (configurable auto-gen ID format), #37 (exported-but-unused functions). Branch model (unchanged from S51): the #42 fix is now ON master via PR #43 (c6ad23dd); add-methodology remains the historical dev branch and holds THIS close-out (master got the fix commits via the merge but NOT these close-out notes ‚Äî they live on add-methodology; the next add-methodology‚Üímaster sync or PR carries them). Repo left checked out on add-methodology. Key files (the #42 fix, for reference): .github/workflows/pkgdown.yaml (dest_dir/folder at the Build site + Deploy steps), _pkgdown.yml (destination: pkgdown_site), .gitignore (pkgdown_site/), .Rbuildignore (^pkgdown_site$), vignettes/ColonyManagerTutorial.Rmd:209-230 (the error-table chunk). Gotchas for the next session: (a) pkgdown builds ALL vignettes from source IGNORING .Rbuildignore ‚Äî so a .Rbuildignore‚Äôd vignette can break pkgdown while R-CMD-check stays green; if you add/edit error types in getEmptyErrorLst(), update the ColonyManagerTutorial.Rmd table in lockstep (positional pairing). (b) build_site_github_pages(dest_dir=...) OVERRIDES _pkgdown.yml destination: ‚Äî change the workflow ARG, not just the yml, to move pkgdown‚Äôs CI output dir. (c) the local docs/ still holds the old Dec-2025 pkgdown build + the tracked methodology/planning; pkgdown no longer writes there ‚Äî harmless cruft. (d) methodology_dashboard.py, SESSION_RUNNER.md, SAFEGUARDS.md are SYNCED (don‚Äôt durably edit; customize via CLAUDE.md).

‚ü¢ Carried ‚Äî Session 51 (promote add-methodology ‚Üí master, DONE; full detail below): Task (Session 51 ‚Äî 2026-06-11): PUSH add-methodology ‚Üí master and validate live (issue #40 close-out): git push -u origin add-methodology ‚Üí PR ‚Üí merge ‚Üí workflow_dispatch shinytest2 on master ‚Üí watch the 13 module-group folds + the two S34 live-run watch items ‚Üí CLOSE #40 on a clean run. (DONE) Started: 2026-06-11 Status: DONE. Promoted the long-lived add-methodology branch (105 commits / 356 files / +44,473‚àí2,892; master a strict ancestor ‚Üí 0 behind ‚Üí clean, conflict-free merge) to master via PR #41 (merge commit 0363ffe3, --merge to PRESERVE the multi-session TDD history ‚Äî never squashed). Pre-flight: ran the documented build-equivalent gate (pkgload::load_all + test_dir non-e2e clean-regression read) = 2140 pass / 0 fail / 0 err / 0 non-e2e offenders (S49 baseline held); confirmed no branch protection on master. Held the merge for the PR‚Äôs first-ever remote CI instead of merging blind ‚Äî it surfaced 4 reds, each triaged to root cause: (1) pkgdown FAIL = REAL & branch-introduced but doc-site-deploy-ONLY ‚Äî docs/methodology+docs/planning are git-tracked inside pkgdown‚Äôs docs/ output dir (.gitignore:32-36: docs/* ignored, !docs/methodology//!docs/planning/ un-ignored), so on a fresh clone docs/ holds those 15 files + NO pkgdown.yml sentinel ‚Üí pkgdown::clean_site()/check_dest_is_pkgdown() refuses to clean ‚Üí exit 1; (2) lint FAIL = known/accepted style debt (open issue #30); (3+4) codecov/patch+project FAIL = external/advisory coverage thresholds (Shiny modules covered by opt-in E2E codecov doesn‚Äôt see; the test-coverage WORKFLOW itself passed). R-CMD-check passed on ALL 5 platforms (macOS, Windows, ubuntu release/devel/oldrel-1) + test-coverage passed ‚Üí package correctness intact. Post-merge live validation (the owner-designated gate): workflow_dispatch-ed shinytest2 on master ‚Üí run 27356752221 SUCCESS (~19 min, < 30-min timeout). Confirmed FIRSTHAND from the run log that all 13 per-module groups (fresh Rscript each) reported passed>0 failed=0 error=0 (app 7 ¬∑ boundary 14 ¬∑ breeding 26 ¬∑ data-ready 32 ¬∑ error-states 15 ¬∑ genetic-value 22 ¬∑ home-nav 15 ¬∑ input 19 ¬∑ pedigree 23 ¬∑ pyramid 12 ¬∑ settings-about 4 ¬∑ summary-stats 8 ¬∑ workflow-integration 8 ‚Üí ‚ÄúAll 13 E2E module groups passed.‚Äù). Both S34 live-run watch items RESOLVED on the FIRST run: (1) renv lib-path resolution under RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED=false ‚Äî R CMD INSTALL + every AppDriver subprocess booted library(nprcgenekeepr); (2) the 23-in-one-process Chrome flake ‚Äî the 8e-7 per-module fresh-process grouping produced ZERO transient errors (first environmental confirmation it holds; per-group isolation means any future transient reds only its own group + is independently re-dispatchable). Closed #40 (gh issue close 40 --reason completed) with a full validation comment (#40 issuecomment-4682226145). Phase-3E = the live master shinytest2 run itself (real runner, real Chrome, real workflow ‚Äî #31). Did NOT merge blind ‚Äî held for the PR‚Äôs first remote CI, diagnosed all 4 reds to root cause (pkgdown docs/ collision via .gitignore; lint=#30; codecov=advisory), surfaced the genuinely-owner‚Äôs merge decision via AskUserQuestion rather than presuming. Verified, didn‚Äôt assume: confirmed the merge landed (master contains b68274d3), confirmed each of the 13 folds firsthand from the run log (not ‚Äúthe step is green‚Äù), confirmed both S34 items. Stayed 1-and-done: logged the pkgdown fix as #42 instead of scope-creeping it into the promotion. Honesty: stated plainly that one clean run confirms-but-doesn‚Äôt-prove the probabilistic flake is gone forever. Stakeholder corrections: 0 (the single decision point was posed + answered). Minor ding: a truly exhaustive pre-push audit could have PREDICTED the pkgdown failure from .gitignore before pushing (I read the workflow triggers and knew pkgdown would RUN, but didn‚Äôt predict it would FAIL until the log). Met/exceeded the S47‚ÄìS50 bar.

‚áí SUGGESTED NEXT = FIX pkgdown (issue #42). #40 is CLOSED and the entire ¬ß8e / issue-#40 assertion-strengthening + CI-stability campaign is now code-complete AND live-validated on master. The cleanest follow-up deliverable is #42 ‚Äî relocate docs/methodology + docs/planning OUT of pkgdown‚Äôs docs/ output dir (Option 1 in #42, keeps the published-site URL stable) or set a pkgdown destination:; then confirm the pkgdown workflow goes green on master. Other standing backlog candidates: #30 (lintr cleanup ‚Äî would also green the lint check), #34 (integrate qcStudbook() in modInput, bug), #38/#32/#26 (configurable auto-gen ID format). Branch model going forward: the campaign is now ON master via PR #41; add-methodology remains the historical dev branch and currently holds THIS Session 51 close-out ‚Äî master got the code via the PR merge but NOT these close-out notes (they live on add-methodology; the next add-methodology‚Üímaster sync, or a #42 PR, carries them). Repo is left checked out on add-methodology. For the executor of #42: root cause + 3 fix options are in issue #42; after the fix, re-dispatch pkgdown (gh workflow run pkgdown.yaml --ref master) or push and watch the per-push run. Key files: .gitignore:32-36 (the docs/* + un-ignore rules), _pkgdown.yml (no destination: ‚Üí defaults to docs/), .github/workflows/pkgdown.yaml. Gotchas: (a) R-CMD-check is GREEN on master ‚Äî don‚Äôt mistake the pkgdown red for a package-correctness problem; (b) the shinytest2 flake fix is confirmed on ONE live run, NOT proven-forever ‚Äî if a future nightly reds a SINGLE group, re-dispatch (that‚Äôs the per-group isolation working, not necessarily a regression); (c) lint (#30) + codecov are independent reds, not caused by #42.

‚ü¢ Carried ‚Äî Session 50 (8e-7 CI per-module fresh-process grouping, DONE; full detail below): Task (Session 50 ‚Äî 2026-06-10): IMPLEMENT slice 8e-7 (issue #40, sub-plan ¬ß8e-7) ‚Äî make .github/workflows/shinytest2.yaml run the 23 ^(app|e2e)- E2E test files in per-module groups, each in a fresh R process, to defang the 23-in-one-process Chrome flake (the S34 [flake-aware-validation] finding). TDD shape: run-and-observe (CI config; no RED‚ÜíGREEN), gated PRE-RED‚Üírun-and-observe via AskUserQuestion. The group partition is statically checkable locally (select EXACTLY the 23 files, no overlap/gap, replicating testthat‚Äôs stripped-name match ‚Äî Learning #33c); the flake fix itself is live-GitHub-runner-only ‚Üí ships UNVALIDATED locally (state in handoff, FM #24‚Äôs cousin). (DONE) Started: 2026-06-10 Status: DONE. Converted the single 23-files-in-one-process E2E run step in .github/workflows/shinytest2.yaml into a single job that loops over 13 per-module group regexes, each in a FRESH Rscript process (owner-gated topology ‚Äî single-job loop over a 13-leg matrix via AskUserQuestion; plan ¬ß8 ‚Äúloop spawning Rscript per group‚Äù ‚Äî 1√ó setup, faithful + cheapest). Caps any one R process at ‚â§3 files (vs 23) ‚Üí defuses the S34 ‚ÄúAppDriver process-count dragon‚Äù (~1 transient error / 5 full-tier single-process runs). Per group: test_dir(filter=rx, stop_on_failure=FALSE) ‚Üí cat a per-group passed/failed/skipped/error report ‚Üí fail/error>0 ‚áí quit(status=1) (checked FIRST) ‚Üí passed==0 ‚áí stop() silent-skip guard (now PER GROUP ‚Äî stronger than the old whole-run guard; a single-group filter drift can‚Äôt hide behind the others; a ZERO-match regex is separately caught by test_dir‚Äôs own ‚ÄúNo test files found‚Äù abort). The bash loop runs ALL groups (full signal, one flake doesn‚Äôt skip the rest) and reds the job if ANY group failed ‚Äî preserving the stop_on_failure job semantics + the job env / Chrome provisioning / R CMD INSTALL / timeout-minutes:30 / removed continue-on-error (R6); each group wrapped in ::group::/::endgroup:: log folds. TDD = run-and-observe (CI config; no RED‚ÜíGREEN, plan ¬ß6), gated PRE-RED‚Üírun-and-observe via AskUserQuestion. [ci-static-proof] partition verified locally (Learning #33c ‚Äî replicate testthat‚Äôs stripped-name grepl match): extracted the 13 regexes from the COMMITTED YAML and proved they select EXACTLY the 23 ^(app|e2e)- files ‚Äî union==tier, no overlap, no gap, no stray ‚Äî applied against the full 182-file dir (the app near-misses test_appServer_dynamicTabs/test_create_test_app correctly untouched by ^app-‚Äôs trailing dash). YAML parses (yaml.safe_load); run-step bash -n clean; [quote-safety] the Rscript -e '...' block has ZERO single-quotes (all R strings double-quoted; comments apostrophe-free ‚Äî an apostrophe would close the bash single-quote and break the step; grep-confirmed). [phase-3E-smoke] run-step LOGIC smoked firsthand on a throwaway test dir (deterministic, no Chrome): pass‚Üíexit0, fail‚Üíexit1 (NOT mislabeled ‚Äúexecuted nothing‚Äù ‚Äî the fail-first reorder), skip‚Üísilent-skip guard‚Üíexit1, nomatch‚Üítest_dir abort‚Üíexit1 (all 4 branches). ‚öÝ The FLAKE mitigation itself is LIVE-RUNNER-ONLY (environmental ‚Äî FM #24‚Äôs cousin): partition/guard/exit logic proven locally, but only the first live GitHub run can confirm the 23-in-one-process flake is gone ‚Äî NOT claimed fixed until a live run shows it. Scope = CI-config ONLY (shinytest2.yaml + these notes); NO R//tests/ change ‚Üí the suite is byte-identical, no regression run needed (the change alters only how CI INVOKES the suite). [news-vs-changelog] ‚Üí CHANGELOG only. Commit: one ci:/docs: close-out (shinytest2.yaml + CHANGELOG + PROJECT_LEARNINGS #50 + these notes) via explicit git add ([macos-dupe-scan]: .DS_Store/..Rcheck//PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html EXCLUDED). Did NOT push or bundle the master push (separate deliverable; FM #2/#18). Re-proof scripts (NOT committed, transient): /tmp/verify_8e7_yaml.R (committed-list partition), /tmp/smoke_8e7.sh (run-step logic).

Session 49 Handoff Evaluation (by Session 50): Score 9/10. What helped: named the exact file (shinytest2.yaml) + the design intent (per-module groups, fresh R process, defang the 23-in-one-process flake) with zero ambiguity; the ‚Äústatically checkable locally ‚Äî replicate testthat‚Äôs stripped-name match in R, per Learning #33c‚Äù steer handed me the EXACT verification method that became the core of the deliverable; the ‚Äúships UNVALIDATED locally / FM #24 cousin / don‚Äôt claim the fix works until a live run‚Äù framing pre-empted the over-claiming trap and correctly scoped Phase-3E to the run-step LOGIC (not the flake); the pointer to S34‚Äôs ‚ÄúWhat Session 34 Did‚Äù gave the root cause (Chrome process-count) + rate (~1/5); the plan ¬ß8e-7/¬ß8 references gave the preserve-list (env/guard/stop_on_failure) + the optional retry. What was missing (minor, not defects): the topology (separate steps vs loop vs matrix) was left open ‚Äî legitimately an owner decision, which I surfaced as AskUserQuestion; and neither handoff nor plan flagged the guard-ORDERING subtlety (fail-check must precede the silent-skip guard) ‚Äî I found it via the smoke (a refinement of new code, not a missing fact). What was wrong: nothing ‚Äî all facts held under firsthand verification. ROI: very high ‚Äî the Learning-#33c steer + the FM-#24-cousin framing were the two load-bearing inputs and both held.

Self-assessment (Session 50): 9/10. Research before building: read SAFEGUARDS + SESSION_RUNNER in full, plan ¬ß8e-7/¬ß8/¬ß6/¬ß11, S34‚Äôs flake characterization, and the current YAML end-to-end before any edit. Verified, didn‚Äôt assume: proved the partition with an executable check against the COMMITTED regexes (not just my draft), then smoked all 4 run-step branches firsthand ‚Äî caught my own guard-ordering imperfection (a real failure mislabeled as silent-skip) via the smoke and fixed it before commit, and proactively caught + neutralized a quote-safety hazard (apostrophes inside the bash-single-quoted -e block). Stakeholder corrections: 0 (both gates + the topology choice answered as posed). Honesty: explicitly scoped the flake fix as live-runner-only (did NOT claim it works) and kept the master push out of scope (1-and-done). Right tool: a deterministic partition is best proven by an executable check (the R script IS the adversarial proof), not an agent fan-out ‚Äî used the script. Minor: my smoke HARNESS briefly showed false exit codes (PIPESTATUS inside a command substitution reads the assignment‚Äôs status, not Rscript‚Äôs) ‚Äî I caught it because the results contradicted the visible R errors, root-caused it to the harness (the committed snippet was never wrong), and fixed it with $?. Met/exceeded the S47‚ÄìS49 bar.

‚áí SUGGESTED NEXT = PUSH add-methodology ‚Üí master (a SEPARATE deliverable ‚Äî NOT bundled here per FM #2/#18). 8e-7 was the LAST slice in the ¬ß8e sub-plan ‚Üí with it landed, the #40 conversion + CI-stability campaign is code-complete. The push is the gate that first exercises the TWO S34 live-run watch items: (1) renv lib-path resolution under RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED=false (the AppDriver subprocess resolving library(nprcgenekeepr) from the SYSTEM lib), and (2) the 23-in-one-process Chrome flake ‚Äî now mitigated by 8e-7‚Äôs per-module fresh-process grouping but UNVALIDATED until the first live run. The shinytest2.yaml schedule + workflow_dispatch triggers only fire once the workflow is on the default branch (master). For the executor: branch add-methodology is still NOT on remote ‚Üí git push -u origin add-methodology, open a PR ‚Üí master, merge, then manually workflow_dispatch the shinytest2 job (don‚Äôt wait for 07:00 UTC) and WATCH: each of the 13 module-group ::group:: log folds should report passed>0 failed=0 error=0; a transient Chrome error in ONE group now reds only that group‚Äôs line (re-dispatch to confirm flake-not-regression). Only after a clean (or clean-on-retry) live run, CLOSE #40 with a validation comment (per S34‚Äôs #39-close precedent). Key files for verification: .github/workflows/shinytest2.yaml ‚Äî the 8e-7 run step (:112-173; group list :127-141, per-group Rscript -e snippet :145-167); local re-proof scripts /tmp/verify_8e7_yaml.R + /tmp/smoke_8e7.sh (transient, not committed). Gotchas: (a) the per-group Rscript -e '...' snippet must stay apostrophe-free (bash single-quote) ‚Äî if you edit it, re-grep for '; (b) check fail/error BEFORE the passed==0 guard or a real failure gets mislabeled ‚Äúexecuted nothing‚Äù; (c) the partition is re-provable with Rscript /tmp/verify_8e7_yaml.R (or rebuild it) if the file list changes; (d) timeout-minutes:30 was kept as-is ‚Äî if the sequential 13-group run exceeds it on the live runner, bump it (watch item). Read plan ¬ß8/¬ß8e-7 + S34‚Äôs ‚ÄúWhat Session 34 Did‚Äù FIRST.

‚ü¢ Carried ‚Äî Session 49 (8e-6c breeding-group flow, DONE; 8e-6 COMPLETE; full detail below): Task (Session 49 ‚Äî 2026-06-10): IMPLEMENT slice 8e-6c (issue #40, plan ¬ß5/¬ß8e-6) ‚Äî the BREEDING flow, the THIRD and FINAL 8e-6 vertical slice. Revive the 3 export-NULL‚Äôd BG blocks D5 (test-e2e-breeding-groups-detailed.R:89) / T7 (test-e2e-breeding-groups-tutorial.R:135) / T9 (test-e2e-breeding-groups-tutorial.R:178) from pane-active-only into genuine data-bearing asserts under RED‚ÜíGREEN, all transitions via AskUserQuestion. Spike the breeding flow firsthand BEFORE RED. Started: 2026-06-10 Status: DONE ‚Äî 8e-6 is now COMPLETE (pedigree ‚úì8e-6a/S47, GV ‚úì8e-6b/S48, breeding ‚úì8e-6c/this). Revived D5/T7/T9 into genuine data-bearing asserts under RED‚ÜíGREEN (3 AskUserQuestion gates: PRE-RED‚ÜíRED ¬∑ RED‚ÜíGREEN ¬∑ GREEN‚ÜíREFACTOR-declined; scope fixed by the user‚Äôs ‚Äú8e-6c‚Äù). Fixture = inst/extdata/obfuscated_rhesus_mhc_ped.csv (same canonical CSV as 8e-6a/b). The live-browser SPIKE (the hard gate, /tmp/spike_8e6c.R) captured the recon‚Äôs two OPEN items firsthand: (1) the Group-Detail nested tabsetPanel (modBreedingGroups.R:72) has NO id ‚Üí set_inputs cannot drive it ‚Üí activate via the UNIQUE DOM link a[data-value='Group Detail'] (count==1), click_element_safe ‚Üí TRUE; (2) the viewGrp selector auto-selects ‚ÄúGroup 1‚Äù on formation (no manual selection needed). Load-bearing facts: the export downloadButtons are STATIC UI (in the DOM always, just display:none in the inactive nested tab) ‚Äî so a get_html-on-button-id assert would pass even in RED (the trap that NULL‚Äôd these in S43). The data-bearing design PAIRS the button LABEL (matched via active-pane innerText ‚Äî absent until the nested tab is activated) with the suspendWhenHidden rendered DT (needs BOTH group formation AND tab visibility) ‚áí each block genuinely needs the full flow, not just nested-tab nav. The spike proved the intermediate state (post-form, pre-activation ‚Üí Ego ID/Export Current Group still FALSE). animalSource="all" uses ped$id directly, ISOLATING breeding from the GVA dependency (the topRanked branch‚Äôs req(geneticValues()), appServer.R:272; shared$geneticValues is only set after a GVA run). Assertions (Option-C STRUCTURAL, seed-INDEPENDENT ‚Äî GREEN with NO NPRC_BG_SEED): D5 assert_active_pane(.,"Export Current Group") + grepl("Ego ID", get_html_safe("#breedingGroups-groupMemberTable")); T7 "Export Current Group" + "Age in Years"; T9 "Export Current Group Kinship Matrix" + grepl("<table", get_html_safe("#breedingGroups-groupKinTable")). NOT asserted: group COUNT (requested numGp=3 but the algo formed ONE big MIS group ‚Äî the S43-handoff‚Äôs {numGp,numGp+1} is not guaranteed) and the within-group kinship invariant (unattainable: module hardcodes ignore=F‚ÄìF). GREEN flow (per block): upload_and_wait(app, fixture) ‚Üí navigate_to_tab("Breeding Groups") ‚Üí set_inputs(animalSource="all", nIterations=5, wait_=FALSE) ‚Üí click_element_safe("#breedingGroups-formGroups") ‚Üí wait_for_module_ready("breedingGroups", timeout=180000) ‚Üí click_element_safe("a[data-value='Group Detail']"). Verification: D5/T7/T9 all GREEN live (detailed 8/0/0, tutorial 11/0/0); [mutation-check] 13/13 ALL PASS (/tmp/mutation_8e6c.R: correct‚ÜíTRUE; wrong export label + imaginary column + right-token-WRONG-table ("Ego ID" in the kin DT) ‚Üí FALSE; foreign-pane (Pedigree Browser) ‚Üí FALSE; pre-flow RED re-confirm ‚Üí FALSE). Non-e2e regression 2140 expectation_success / 0 failed / 0 error / 159 skip / 5 modPyramid warn / 0 non-e2e offenders ‚Äî proven byte-IDENTICAL pre- and post-edit via a git stash diff (the edit touches only e2e blocks, which skip at create_test_app() before any assertion ‚áí structurally inert on the non-e2e count). ‚öÝ The 2140-vs-S48‚Äôs-2180 is a MEASUREMENT-METHOD difference, NOT a regression: pkgload::load_all under renv ‚Üí 2140/0-err (clean) vs library() under RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED=false (bare system lib) ‚Üí ERRORs on tests whose Suggests deps the system lib lacks; S48‚Äôs 2180 was the other method. Phase-3E: the live GREEN AppDriver runs (real upload‚ÜíQC‚Üíkinship‚Üígroup-formation‚ÜíGroup-Detail render across the 2 files) + the 13/13 mutation spike ARE the runtime (#31). Test-tree-only (2 e2e files) ‚Üí no document()/NEWS; tests/ lint-exempt. ‚öÝ SYSTEM lib was ALREADY current (gatedSeed/downloadGroupKin/viewGrp/‚ÄúGroup Detail‚Äù present, v1.1.0.9000) since R/ unchanged since S48 ‚Üí verified firsthand under the renv-bypass (NOT plain library(), which renv redirects to the stale project lib and falsely showed gatedSeed FALSE), no reinstall needed. REFACTOR (shared flow helper) DECLINED (precedent of 8e-6a/8e-6b + the GVA and breeding run-flows DIVERGE on the nested-tab activation ‚Üí a ‚Äúshared‚Äù helper is messier than a clean abstraction). Commit: one test:/docs: close-out (2 e2e files + CHANGELOG + PROJECT_LEARNINGS #49 + these notes), explicit git add (.DS_Store/..Rcheck//PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html excluded).

Session 48 Handoff Evaluation (by Session 49): Score 9/10. What helped: the handoff named the exact slice (8e-6c), the exact blocks+lines (D5 :89, T7 :135, T9 :178), the spike recipe (boot‚Üíupload‚Üínav‚ÜíformGroups‚Üíready‚Üíactivate Group Detail), the explicit ‚Äúrecon left the nested-tab id + viewGrp selector OPEN ‚Äî capture FIRSTHAND‚Äù flag (which correctly told me NOT to trust a remembered id ‚Äî and indeed the tabset has NO id, so the real answer was the DOM-link selector I found in the spike), the ignore=F‚ÄìF-unattainable + ‚Äúassert export-button presence‚Äù steer (kept me from asserting the kinship invariant), the {numGp,numGp+1} caveat (explicitly hedged ‚ÄúNOT a hard +1‚Äù ‚Äî which saved me, since the algo actually formed ONE group), the suspendWhenHidden note, the browser env vars, and the SYSTEM-lib ‚Äúverify firsthand, reinstall ONLY if R/ changed‚Äù method. All load-bearing facts held under firsthand spiking. What was missing (minor): the handoff phrased it as ‚Äúcapture its tabsetPanel id‚Äù (assuming an id exists) ‚Äî there is none, so the activation is a DOM click; and it didn‚Äôt anticipate the regression measurement-method sensitivity (2140 vs 2180) ‚Äî I resolved that with a stash diff. What was wrong: {numGp,numGp+1} (actual = 1 group) ‚Äî but it was appropriately hedged and steered away from asserting count, so it never misled. ROI: very high ‚Äî ‚Äúspike firsthand BEFORE RED‚Äù + the OPEN-items flag + the ‚Äúassert export-button presence‚Äù steer produced a clean session with 0 stakeholder corrections.

Self-assessment (Session 49): 9/10. Research before creative work: read plan ¬ß8e-6, all 3 BG e2e files, modBreedingGroups.R (full), helper-shinytest2.R (full), the appServer breeding wiring, the 8e-6a/8e-6b upload idiom; verified system-lib currency firsthand under the AppDriver‚Äôs ACTUAL resolution. Read implementations not descriptions: traced the no-id nested tab / download buttons / viewGrp / suspendWhenHidden DTs through the source and spiked the live flow before RED (the spike CONFIRMED every assertion-relevant fact firsthand ‚Äî FM #11/#20 avoided). Stakeholder corrections: 0 (all 3 gates answered proceed/decline-as-recommended). Got right: the no-id nested-tab DOM-click discovery, the PAIRED visibility-gated-label + suspendWhenHidden-DT data-bearing design (so each block needs the data flow), animalSource="all" isolation, seed-independence, the 13/13 mutation matrix incl.¬Ýthe right-token-WRONG-table arm, and the rigorous stash-diff proof of regression inertness (caught + EXPLAINED the 2140-vs-2180 method sensitivity rather than chasing/hand-waving the number ‚Äî a [regression-read] refinement beyond S48). Minor: I first mis-read system-lib currency via plain library() (renv-redirected ‚Üí gatedSeed FALSE) before re-checking under the renv-bypass ‚Äî a momentary detour, self-corrected in the same step. Met/exceeded the S47/S48 bar.

‚áí SUGGESTED NEXT = 8e-7 (CI per-module fresh-process grouping) + then PUSH add-methodology ‚Üí master. 8e-6 is COMPLETE; only 8e-7 remains in the plan (docs/planning/phase8e-assertion-strengthening-subplan.md ¬ß8e-7, risk MED, orthogonal ‚Äî can run anytime): make .github/workflows/shinytest2.yaml run the 23 ^(app|e2e)- files in per-module groups, each in a fresh R process (the ¬ß5/8c ‚Äúrun grouped‚Äù guidance) to defang the 23-in-one-process Chrome flake (~1 transient error / 5 full-tier runs; the S34 [flake-aware-validation] finding). ‚öÝ Ships UNVALIDATED locally (the flake is environmental ‚Äî state this in the handoff, FM #24‚Äôs cousin; do NOT claim it fixes the flake until a live run shows it). TDD shape: CI config / run-and-observe (no RED‚ÜíGREEN, like 8b‚Äì8d). Statically checkable locally (the group partition selects EXACTLY the 23 files with no overlap/gap ‚Äî replicate testthat‚Äôs stripped-name match in R, per Learning #33c); the flake fix itself is live-GitHub-runner-only. After 8e-7: finally push add-methodology ‚Üí master ‚Äî the FIRST master CI run exercises the two S34 live-run watch items (renv lib-path resolution + the 23-in-one-process flake). Branch add-methodology is still NOT on remote. For the executor: the breeding-flow recipe (now proven) is upload_and_wait ‚Üí navigate_to_tab("Breeding Groups") ‚Üí set_inputs(animalSource="all", nIterations=5, wait_=FALSE) ‚Üí click "#breedingGroups-formGroups" ‚Üí wait_for_module_ready("breedingGroups",180000) ‚Üí click "a[data-value='Group Detail']"; the Group-Detail nested tabset has no id (DOM-click its a[data-value='Group Detail'], never set_inputs); the non-e2e regression count is measurement-method-sensitive (prove a test-only e2e edit inert with a git stash diff, not the headline number); check SYSTEM-lib currency under RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED=false, NOT plain library(). Browser env: NPRC_RUN_E2E=true NOT_CRAN=true RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED=false. Read plan ¬ß8e-7 + S34‚Äôs ‚ÄúWhat Session 34 Did‚Äù (the flake characterization) FIRST.

‚ü¢ Carried ‚Äî Session 48 (8e-6b GVA-run flow, DONE; full detail below): Task (Session 48 ‚Äî 2026-06-10): IMPLEMENT slice 8e-6b (issue #40, plan ¬ß5/¬ß8e-6) ‚Äî the GVA flow: upload_and_wait ‚Üí nav Genetic Value Analysis ‚Üí click #geneticValue-runAnalysis ‚Üí revive the 2 NULL‚Äôd GV blocks B1 (test-e2e-genetic-value-tutorial.R:99 Value Designation) + B2 (:144 Z-score) as genuine data-bearing asserts on the rendered #geneticValue-rankingsTable, RED‚ÜíGREEN, all transitions via AskUserQuestion. Keep asserts STRUCTURAL (Option C). Spike the GVA run firsthand BEFORE RED. Started: 2026-06-10 Status: DONE. Revived B1 (test-e2e-genetic-value-tutorial.R:99 Value Designation) + B2 (:144 Z-score) from pane-active-only into genuine data-bearing asserts on the rendered #geneticValue-rankingsTable under RED‚ÜíGREEN (3 AskUserQuestion phase gates: PRE-RED‚ÜíRED ¬∑ RED‚ÜíGREEN ¬∑ GREEN‚ÜíREFACTOR-declined; scope was fixed by the user‚Äôs ‚Äú8e-6b‚Äù instruction, not re-asked). Fixture = inst/extdata/obfuscated_rhesus_mhc_ped.csv (same canonical CSV as 8e-6a). The live-browser SPIKE (the hard gate, /tmp/spike_8e6b.R) CORRECTED a static-read trap FIRST: reportGV.R:144 cbind(demographics, indivMeanKin, zScores, gu, offspring) shows NO value column ‚Äî but reportGV.R:146 wraps it report = orderReport(finalData, ped), and orderReport() splits‚ÜírankSubjects() ADDS value(‚ÄúHigh/Low/Undetermined‚Äù)+rank (rankSubjects.R:36-46)‚Üírbind re-flattens, so the rendered DT carries value AND zScores. NEW load-bearing fact: the table truncates to input$topN (default 20, modGeneticValue.R:240) and the module re-orders by rank(indivMeanKin‚àígu) ascending ‚Üí the top-20 are the BEST animals ‚Üí all ‚ÄúHigh Value‚Äù (spike: "of 20 entries", "High Value"=TRUE, "Low Value"/"Undetermined"=FALSE). ‚üπ the ONLY faithful Value-designation token in the DEFAULT view is ‚ÄúHigh Value‚Äù (asserting ‚ÄúLow Value‚Äù/‚ÄúUndetermined‚Äù would RED a green flow). Assertions: B1 get_html_safe("#geneticValue-rankingsTable") matches "High Value"; B2 matches "zScores" (the z-score DT column header). Both Option-C structural, seed-INDEPENDENT ‚Äî verified GREEN with NO NPRC_GVA_SEED set. GREEN flow (added to both blocks): upload_and_wait(app, fixture) ‚Üí navigate_to_tab("Genetic Value Analysis") ‚Üí app$set_inputs(\geneticValue-nIterations`=100)(min allowed, for speed) ‚Üíclick_element_safe(‚Äú#geneticValue-runAnalysis‚Äù)‚Üíwait_for_module_ready(‚ÄúgeneticValue‚Äù, timeout=90000). ThegvResultseventReactive'ssetDataReady(on#geneticValue-moduleContainer) fires because the default-visible Rankings inner tab readsgvaView()‚ÜígvResults()on the click ‚Üíwait_for_module_readyis the right barrier (NO inner-tabset switch needed; Summary/Visualizations staysuspendWhenHidden). RED proven firsthand (pre-run = emptyvisibility:hiddendiv ‚Üí both tokens FALSE). **8/8 blocks GREEN** in the file (the 6 static-UI blocks unaffected). **[mutation-check] ALL PASS** (/tmp/mutation_8e6b.R: correct High Value/zScores‚ÜíTRUE; wrong designation Low Value/Undetermined‚ÜíFALSE; foreign-pane Form Groups[BG]/Focal Animals[Ped]‚ÜíFALSE; RED re-confirm pre-run‚Üíboth FALSE). **Non-e2e regression 2180expectation_success/ 0 failed / 0 error / 156 skip / 5modPyramidwarn / 0 non-e2e offenders** = S47 baseline held EXACTLY (test-only; e2e self-skips withoutNPRC_RUN_E2E). **Phase-3E:** the live GREEN AppDriver run (real upload‚ÜíQC‚ÜíGVA) + the mutation spike ARE the runtime (#31). Test-tree-only (1 e2e file) ‚Üí nodocument()/NEWS;tests/lint-exempt. **‚öÝ SYSTEM lib was ALREADY current** (gatedSeedpresent, v1.1.0.9000) sinceR/unchanged since S47's reinstall ‚Üí verified firsthand, **no reinstall needed** (the AppDriver subprocess resolvesnprcgenekeeprfrom/Library/Frameworks/‚Ä¶/R-4.5/‚Ä¶underRENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED=false; the reinstall ACTION is conditional onR/having changed). **Commit:** onetest:/docs:close-out (1 e2e file + CHANGELOG + PROJECT_LEARNINGS #48 + these notes), explicitgit add(.DS_Store/..Rcheck//PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html` excluded).

Session 47 Handoff Evaluation (by Session 48): Score 9/10. What helped: the handoff named the exact slice (8e-6b), the exact files+lines (B1 :99, B2 :144), the critic-corrected facts (value levels High/Low/Undetermined, z-col zScores not rank), the topN=20 truncation hint (‚Äúassert min(topN,n) or raise topN‚Äù) ‚Äî which was the seed of this session‚Äôs load-bearing discovery ‚Äî the ‚Äúspike the GVA run firsthand BEFORE RED‚Äù directive, the suspendWhenHidden note for Summary/Visualizations, and the SYSTEM-lib reinstall caveat. All facts held up under firsthand spiking. What was missing (minor): the handoff didn‚Äôt spell out that only ‚ÄúHigh Value‚Äù survives the default top-N render (the top rows are all best-ranked ‚Üí High Value; Low/Undetermined truncated away) ‚Äî I discovered that firsthand from the topN hint; and the GVA module‚Äôs inner-tabset id was left ‚Äúopen‚Äù (didn‚Äôt cost me ‚Äî rankingsTable is on the default-visible Rankings tab). What was wrong: nothing. ROI: very high ‚Äî the spike CONFIRMED S47‚Äôs facts rather than discovering them cold, and the ‚Äúspike before RED‚Äù + SYSTEM-lib notes prevented two known traps.

Self-assessment (Session 48): 9/10. Research before creative work: read the plan ¬ß5/¬ß8e-6, the GVA module, the helpers, and traced the value column‚Äôs provenance through reportGV‚ÜíorderReport‚ÜírankSubjects‚Üírbind (a description-level read of reportGV.R:144 alone would have produced a WRONG ‚Äúno value column‚Äù assertion ‚Äî FM #11/#20 avoided). Stakeholder corrections needed: 0 (all 3 gates answered proceed/decline-as-recommended). Got right: the column-provenance trace, the firsthand topN-truncation discovery (only High Value in the default view), seed-independence proof, foreign-pane mutation tokens, exact-baseline regression. Met/exceeded the S47 quality bar (same rigor: hard-gate spike, discriminating RED, mutation-check, Phase-3E live run). Minor: a second browser run for the mutation matrix (could have folded into the GREEN file run) ‚Äî acceptable cost for a clean citable artifact.

‚áí SUGGESTED NEXT = 8e-6c (BREEDING flow) ‚Äî the THIRD and FINAL 8e-6 vertical slice ‚Üí completes 8e-6 (all deferred data-bearing asserts landed: pedigree S40 ‚úì8e-6a, GV S42 ‚úì8e-6b, BG S43 remaining). Revive the 3 export-NULL‚Äôd BG blocks D5 (test-e2e-breeding-groups-detailed.R:89) / T7 (-tutorial.R:135) / T9 (-tutorial.R:178). Spike the breeding flow firsthand BEFORE RED (boot‚Üíupload_and_wait‚Üínav ‚ÄúBreeding Groups‚Äù‚Üíclick_element_safe("#breedingGroups-formGroups")‚Üíwait_for_module_ready("breedingGroups")‚Üíactivate the nested ‚ÄúGroup Detail‚Äù tab + make a viewGrp selection‚Üíinspect). ‚öÝ Critic-corrected facts (carried from S47 recon wf_855f37cd-4ac): the module‚Äôs breedingGroups() length is ‚àà {numGp, numGp+1} (filterValidGroups drops the empty leftover ‚Äî NOT a hard +1); the strict within-group kinship invariant is unattainable (the module hardcodes ignore=F‚ÄìF) ‚áí assert the WEAK form or just export-button presence. The D5/T7/T9 exports live in the INACTIVE ‚ÄúGroup Detail‚Äù nested tab (display:none ‚Üí not in active-pane innerText) ‚Üí you must activate that nested tab first (capture its tabsetPanel id + the viewGrp selector FIRSTHAND ‚Äî recon left them open). Consider the deferred REFACTOR here: 8e-6b declined factoring the upload‚Üínav‚Üírun flow because a reusable run-flow helper should co-design with THIS breeding flow (same run-and-render shape) ‚Äî if 8e-6c writes an analogous flow, factor a shared helper-shinytest2.R helper (own GREEN‚ÜíREFACTOR gate). ‚öÝ Reinstall current source into the SYSTEM lib ONLY if R/ changed (8e-6c is test-only ‚Üí won‚Äôt change R/; verify currency with body(modGeneticValueServer) grepl gatedSeed as this session did). Browser env: NPRC_RUN_E2E=true NOT_CRAN=true RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED=false. Read plan ¬ß5/¬ß8e-6 + S43‚Äôs ‚ÄúWhat Session 43 Did‚Äù (the BG static-UI census) FIRST. After 8e-6 completes: 8e-7 (CI per-module fresh-process grouping, orthogonal) + finally push add-methodology ‚Üí master (the two S34 CI watch items ‚Äî renv lib-path / 23-in-one-process Chrome flake ‚Äî first exercise then). Branch add-methodology still NOT on remote.

‚ü¢ Carried ‚Äî Session 47 (8e-6a pedigree-table flow, DONE; full detail below): Task (Session 47 ‚Äî 2026-06-10): IMPLEMENT slice 8e-6 (issue #40, plan ¬ß5/¬ß8e-6) ‚Äî wire the real analytical pipeline end-to-end (upload+QC ‚Üí GVA ‚Üí breeding) with rendered-output (get_value(output="<ns>-<id>")) + Option-C structural-invariant assertions, RED‚ÜíGREEN, all transitions via AskUserQuestion. Lands the deferred data-bearing asserts (4 NULL‚Äôd pedigree [S40] + 2 NULL‚Äôd GV [S42: Value Designation/Z-score] + 3 export-NULL‚Äôd BG [S43: D5/T7/T9]). Plan ¬ß5/¬ß8e-6 permits per-flow close-out (vertical slices) ‚Üí scope (which flow[s] this session covers) is an owner-gated pre-RED decision. (IN PROGRESS) Started: 2026-06-10 Status: DONE. Revived the 3 NULL‚Äôd pedigree blocks (A1 test-e2e-pedigree-module.R:60, A2 -detailed.R:63, A3 -tutorial.R:25) as genuine data-bearing asserts on the rendered #pedigree-pedigreeTable under RED‚ÜíGREEN (4 AskUserQuestion gates: scope‚Üí8e-6a ¬∑ PRE-RED‚ÜíRED ¬∑ RED‚ÜíGREEN; REFACTOR declined ‚Äî factoring only the 3-line upload would break these files‚Äô inline-setup style + expand scope). Fixture = inst/extdata/obfuscated_rhesus_mhc_ped.csv (375 rows, canonical CSV). A live-browser SPIKE (the hard gate) settled the recon critic‚Äôs G2/G4/G5 FIRST (wf_855f37cd-4ac): (G4) default pedFile/pedigreeFileOne upload flips dataInput ready; (G5) the pedigree OUTPUT is suspendWhenHidden ‚Äî NULL until navigate_to_tab("Pedigree Browser") un-suspends it, then it renders 375 rows (so the driver MUST nav AFTER upload); (G2) get_value(output="pedigree-pedigreeTable") returns a json-class string ‚Äî but it un-suspends to non-NULL even WITHOUT data, so is.null() is NOT a data discriminator ‚Üí the genuine discriminator is the rendered-DOM content via get_html_safe(app, "#pedigree-pedigreeTable") (refines plan ¬ß2.3‚Äôs ‚Äúoutput tier‚Äù). RED proven firsthand (empty hidden div ‚Üí every content assert fails), then GREEN (upload_and_wait before nav). Assertions: A1 "of 375 entries" + "sire"; A2 + "dam"; A3 "dataTables_length" (the Show-N-entries menu) + "of 375 entries". A4 (status-filter) left honest pane-active (no filter CONTROL exists; note the table DOES render a recordStatus COLUMN ‚Üí a future session could make A4 data-bearing). 3/3 files GREEN (module 6/6, detailed 8/8, tutorial 9/9). [mutation-check] ALL PASS (correct 375/sire/dam/length-menu‚ÜíTRUE; wrong 999 & off-by-one 374, foreign genotype, foreign-pane Breeding Groups, same-pattern-on-export-button ‚Üí all FALSE). Non-e2e regression 2180 expectation_success / 0 failed / 0 error / 156 skip / 5 modPyramid warn / 0 non-e2e offenders = S46 baseline held EXACTLY (test-only; e2e self-skips without NPRC_RUN_E2E). Phase-3E: the live GREEN AppDriver run (real upload‚ÜíQC‚Üípedigree-render) + the mutation spike ARE the runtime (#31). Test-tree-only ‚Üí no document()/NEWS; tests/ lint-exempt. ‚öÝ Reinstalled current source into the SYSTEM lib first ‚Äî the AppDriver subprocess resolves nprcgenekeepr to /Library/Frameworks/.../R-4.5/.../library (NOT the renv cache) under RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED=false, and that install was Jul-2025 stale. Commit: one test:/docs: close-out (3 e2e files + CHANGELOG + PROJECT_LEARNINGS #47 + these notes), explicit git add (.DS_Store/..Rcheck//PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html excluded). ‚áí SUGGESTED NEXT = 8e-6b (GVA flow) ‚Äî after upload_and_wait, click #geneticValue-runAnalysis, revive the 2 NULL‚Äôd GV blocks B1 (test-e2e-genetic-value-tutorial.R:99 Value Designation) + B2 (:144 Z-score) on #geneticValue-rankingsTable. Critic-corrected facts (recon wf_855f37cd-4ac): the DT value column levels are "High Value"/"Low Value"/"Undetermined" (NOT High/Low), z-score column is zScores (NOT rank); rankingsTable truncates to input$topN (default 20) ‚Üí assert min(topN, n) or raise topN; keep asserts STRUCTURAL (Option C) ‚Äî seed channel (G8) unproven + gene-drop gu RNG-margin-sensitive ‚áí rank/value/row-order not value-stable. ‚öÝ Summary/Visualizations are inner-tabset suspendWhenHidden ‚Äî to read gvSummary/gvScatterPlot you must set_inputs the GVA module‚Äôs inner tabsetPanel id first (CAPTURE that id firsthand ‚Äî recon left it open); rankingsTable is on the default-visible ‚ÄúRankings‚Äù tab so it reads without a switch. Spike the GVA run like 8e-6a (boot‚Üíupload‚Üínav GVA‚Üírun‚Üíinspect get_html_safe("#geneticValue-rankingsTable")) BEFORE RED. Then 8e-6c (breeding) ‚Äî #breedingGroups-formGroups + the 3 export-NULL‚Äôd BG blocks D5 (test-e2e-breeding-groups-detailed.R:89) / T7 (-tutorial.R:135) / T9 (-tutorial.R:178), which need nested ‚ÄúGroup Detail‚Äù tab activation + a viewGrp selection; the module‚Äôs breedingGroups() length is ‚àà {numGp, numGp+1} (filterValidGroups drops the empty leftover ‚Äî NOT a hard +1), and the strict within-group kinship invariant is unattainable (module hardcodes ignore=F‚ÄìF) ‚áí assert the weak form or just export-button presence. ‚öÝ ALWAYS reinstall current source into the SYSTEM lib before an e2e spike if R/ changed. ‚ü¢ Carried ‚Äî Session 46 (8e-5 determinism hook, DONE; full detail below): Task (Session 46 ‚Äî 2026-06-10): IMPLEMENT slice 8e-5 (issue #40, plan ¬ß7) ‚Äî the FIRST 8e PRODUCTION R/ change [production-in-disguise]: an env/option-gated set_seed() determinism hook (Option A) in modGeneticValueServer + modBreedingGroupsServer (both EXPORTED). Owner-gated approach choice (AskUserQuestion: Option A env/option gate, over Option B‚Äôs user-facing UI seed input and Option C-only‚Äôs no-production-change invariants) + full RED‚ÜíGREEN‚ÜíREFACTOR, all four transitions via AskUserQuestion. ALSO, on owner instruction, committed the owner‚Äôs 14-file R/ + test_modPyramid.R reformat as the clean baseline (d0989408, re-verified inert) + a follow-on docs: commit regenerating 3 man pages the reformat desynced. The gate (Option A): at the top of each eventReactive body ‚Äî immediately after req(), ahead of withProgress, so no intervening RNG is consumed before the engine ‚Äî seed <- getOption("nprcgenekeepr.gva_seed", as.integer(Sys.getenv("NPRC_GVA_SEED", NA))); if (!is.na(seed)) set_seed(seed) (modGeneticValue.R:135 ahead of reportGV(); modBreedingGroups.R:191 ahead of groupAddAssign(), with nprcgenekeepr.bg_seed/NPRC_BG_SEED), via the existing exported set_seed() (pins sample.kind="Rounding"). REFACTOR factored the duplicated 3-line gate into @noRd gatedSeed(optionName, envName) in R/set_seed.R (both modules call it; @noRd ‚áí no NAMESPACE/man delta). 8 new browser-free testServer tests (test_modGeneticValue.R + test_modBreedingGroups.R, 3 RED + 1 guard each): determinism (two runs identical on gu/groups, + a non-vacuous length>0 guard so a failed capture can‚Äôt fake identical(NULL,NULL)), set_seed-mock called-with-seed (local_mocked_bindings, no .package), env-var fallback, and the default-path-not-called guard.

Status: Done. 8/8 seed tests GREEN / 14 expectations; RED proven firsthand FIRST (6 genuine failures + 2 guards passing; the length>0 assertions confirm the <<- capture is non-vacuous and the determinism comparison genuinely fails ‚Äî two unseeded testServer runs differ because the global RNG state carries across invocations). Non-e2e regression 2180 expectation_success / 0 failed / 0 error / 156 skip / 5 pre-existing modPyramid warn / 0 non-e2e offenders (= 2166 baseline + 14 new; default analytical path unchanged with the gate unset = the R2 risk mitigation). devtools::check() 0 errors / 0 warnings / 3 NOTEs ‚Äî all pre-existing/environmental (stale spelling.Rout.save baseline, ‚Äúfuture file timestamps‚Äù, non-standard top-level dev files = the S35 baseline; NO new gatedSeed ‚Äúno visible global function‚Äù NOTE ‚Üí the lintr single-file flag is a [stale-namespace] artifact resolved by full-package analysis). document() no NAMESPACE/man delta for the @noRd helper, but it DID regenerate 3 man pages (appServer/modSummaryStatsServer/savePlotToFile) the reformat desynced (savePlotToFile \usage 8‚Üí8L is a real codoc drift that would have WARNed) ‚Üí separate docs: commit. Phase-3E: runModularApp() from working-tree source (load_all ‚áí hook active) serves HTTP 200 on the gate-unset path. Lint net-zero on changed R/. Commits (3, explicit git add): d0989408 (style: owner‚Äôs reformat) ‚Üí a docs: man-regen ‚Üí the 8e-5 feat:/test: close-out (R/set_seed.R + R/modGeneticValue.R + R/modBreedingGroups.R + the 2 test files + CHANGELOG + PROJECT_LEARNINGS #46 + these notes); .DS_Store/..Rcheck//PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.html excluded. ‚áí SUGGESTED NEXT = 8e-6 (the deepest slice, risk HIGH üêâüêâ; plan ¬ß5/¬ß8e-6) ‚Äî drive the real pipeline opt-in: upload+QC via the now-correct upload_and_wait(app, <file>) ‚Üí #dataInput-getData ‚Üí wait_for_module_ready(app, "dataInput") (8e-4 fixed these ids), then GVA (#geneticValue-runAnalysis) and breeding (#breedingGroups-formGroups); assert rendered reactive outputs (get_value(output="<ns>-<id>"); suspendWhenHidden ‚áí hidden outputs empty) + Option-C structural invariants (GVA: rank = permutation of seq_len(n), gu ‚àà [0,1], nrow == probands; breeding: nGroups == numGp, partition no-dupes, within-group max kinship ‚â§ threshold, harem ‚áí one male). 8e-5 now ENABLES optional exact-value assertions ‚Äî set the env var with withr::local_envvar(NPRC_GVA_SEED = "42") (and NPRC_BG_SEED) AROUND AppDriver$new() (the subprocess inherits the parent env ‚Äî the RELIABLE channel; AppDriver$new(seed=) is NOT, plan ¬ß2.5); but 8e-6 does NOT require 8e-5 (Option-C invariants are robust to RNG drift and usable regardless). The deferred data-bearing asserts land here: 4 NULL‚Äôd pedigree [S40] + 2 NULL‚Äôd GV [S42: Value Designation/Z-score] + 3 export-NULL‚Äôd BG [S43: D5/T7/T9]. ‚öÝ üêâüêâ dragons: longest browser runtime + most flake-prone (the ¬ß7/8c Chrome process-count dragon; small nIterations via set_inputs for speed; needs a known-good fixture studbook that flows QC‚ÜíGVA‚Üíbreeding). OR 8e-7 (CI per-module fresh-process grouping, live-runner-only, orthogonal ‚Äî can run anytime). Browser env: NPRC_RUN_E2E=true NOT_CRAN=true RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED=false. Read plan ¬ß5/¬ß8e-6 FIRST. GOTCHAS in ‚ÄúWhat Session 46 Did‚Äù below. Branch add-methodology still NOT on remote (two S34 CI watch items pending the first master run).

‚ü¢ Carried ‚Äî Session 45 (8e-4 hybrid namespace-fix + error/boundary revival, DONE; full detail in ‚ÄúWhat Session 45 Did‚Äù below): Task (Session 45 ‚Äî 2026-06-10): IMPLEMENT slice 8e-4 (issue #40) ‚Äî namespace fix (input-‚ÜídataInput-) + error-states/boundary interaction revival. The FIRST 8e slice that is NOT pure run-and-observe: a HYBRID ‚Äî RED‚ÜíGREEN (namespace fix, 4 tests) + run-and-observe (23 conversions), gated PRE-RED‚ÜíRED then RED‚ÜíGREEN via AskUserQuestion. Converted all 26 browser-booting blocks across test-e2e-error-states.R (13) + test-e2e-boundary-conditions.R (13) from content-blind nchar(html)>100 / dead-grepl / interaction-noop-tryCatch to behavioral assert_active_pane(...), and fixed the dataInput- namespace at all 5 ¬ß2.4 sites + the upload_and_wait helper. Namespace fix (RED‚ÜíGREEN, 5 sites): helper-shinytest2.R upload_and_wait default module_id "input"‚Üí"dataInput" (:155) + the hardcoded `input-pedigreeFileOne` now DERIVED via do.call(app$upload_file, stats::setNames(list(file_path), sprintf("%s-%s", module_id, file_input_id))); error-states #input-getData‚Üí#dataInput-getData + `input-minParentAge`‚Üí`dataInput-minParentAge`; boundary `input-minParentAge`‚Üí`dataInput-minParentAge`. The input module is namespaced dataInput (appUI.R:123 modInputUI("dataInput")); data-module="input" (modInput.R:31) is a LABEL, not the namespace. ¬ß2.4 DO-NOT-CHANGE list respected (data-ready bare ids + data-module="input" literal; #goto_input; tab anchors a[data-value=]). ‚öÝ Two discriminators (firsthand-spiked, refines the plan‚Äôs ‚Äúwrong id throws‚Äù): for the namespaced textInput the wrong-id discriminator is the VALUE READ-BACK ‚Äî shinytest2 set_inputs(\input-minParentAge`)on an unbound id **WARNS and never sets** (does NOT raise an R error), soget_value(‚ÄúdataInput-minParentAge‚Äù)stays at the default "2.0" ‚âÝ the set value; for the **actionButton** it is theapp$click(‚Äú#input-getData‚Äù)**THROW** (‚Üíclick_element_safe‚ÜíFALSE). A new browser-free recording-stub unit test intest_helper_shinytest2.Ranchors the helper fix in the ALWAYS-RUN layer (+4 expectations: a formals default test + a recorded upload/click-target test). **Map ‚Äî 4 RED‚ÜíGREEN (3 e2e ns blocks + 1 helper unit) ¬∑ 23 run-and-observe conversions ¬∑ 0 deferred to 8e-6.** RED‚ÜíGREEN e2e: es#1 "no file selected" (click#dataInput-getData‚Üí assert clickable +#shiny-notification-panelmatches "select a file" ‚Äî the no-file path's transientshowNotificationtoast,modInput.R:305-308, the ONLY pre-data error-state), es#2 "zero min age" + bd#2 "non-numeric age" (setdataInput-minParentAge‚Üíget_valuereflects "0"/"abc" + Input pane active). Run-and-observe (each navigates as before ‚Üíassert_active_pane(app,,)): Pedigree (Focal Animals|Display Options|search), GV (Run Analysis|Iterations|Threshold|Export All|Export Subset), BG (Form Groups|Number of groups|Sex ratio|Harem), Pyramid (Bin Size|Age Unit|Age Label|Pyramid|Age|Sex`), + the rapid-switch/repeat-click blocks asserting the FINAL pane (Home/Input) and the narrow/short-window blocks asserting Home active on BOOT. Every pattern [verify-first]-confirmed against the real active-pane innerText (spike: all cells TRUE).

Map ‚Äî 10 keep-regex-rescope ¬∑ 1 navbar-chrome carve-out: settings-about 4 KEEP verbatim (S1 (Settings,"Settings|Configuration|options") ¬∑ S2 (About,"About|Version|GeneKeepR|Oregon|Primate") ¬∑ S3 (Help,"Help|Documentation|Online") ¬∑ S4 (About,"NIH|funded|grant")); workflow-integration: W1 ‚Äúvisits N tabs‚Äù loop ‚Üí 6 per-pane assert_active_pane (Home Welcome|Home|GeneKeepR ¬∑ Input Upload|File|Input ¬∑ Pedigree Pedigree|Browser ¬∑ Pyramid Pyramid|Age|Sex ¬∑ GV Genetic|Value ¬∑ BG Breeding|Groups) + threshold >= 3‚Üí== 6L (so a single failed nav reds the block ‚Äî the discriminating lever is the THRESHOLD); W2/W3 is.list() responsiveness tautologies ‚Üí genuine pane-switch asserts (Input-then-Home; final-pane Home after the 4-switch loop), drop unused get_values_safe(); W4 navbar brand ‚Üí CARVE-OUT scoped to .navbar-brand (grepl("GeneKeepR", get_html_safe(app,".navbar-brand")) ‚Äî brand is <span class="navbar-brand">GeneKeepR</span>, OUTSIDE any .tab-pane; strictly STRONGER than the old whole-body grepl, mutation-proven); W5 (Input,"upload|file|browse") ¬∑ W6 (Genetic Value Analysis,"Genetic|Value|Analysis|kinship|population") ¬∑ W7 (Breeding Groups,"Breeding|Groups|formation|animals"). Every pattern [verify-first]-confirmed against the real active-pane innerText in spike v2 (ALL_OK). ‚ü¢ Carried below ‚Äî Session 35 (Phase 9 COMPLETE, #27 CLOSED) + still-relevant baked-in notes (Phase-8 CI / Phase-7 / Phase-5/6 / tracker reconciliation): Task: Session 35 ‚Äî IMPLEMENTED Phase 9 of the Shiny-module conversion (the FINAL phase): retire the legacy monolith. runGeneKeepR() ‚Üí a lifecycle::deprecate_soft() alias launching runModularApp(port=6013L, launch.browser=TRUE) (zero-arg callers keep working); deleted inst/application/ (17 tracked files, standalone revertible commit per ¬ß15) + the owner-approved orphans getMinParentAge/getLogo/shouldShowErrorTab/modMinimalTest; docs/pkgdown/NEWS/ROADMAP/vignette updated; issue #27 CLOSED. Strict TDD (RED‚ÜíGREEN gated) + 4 owner AskUserQuestions (go/no-go ¬∑ shouldShowErrorTab=delete ¬∑ modMinimalTest=delete ¬∑ one-session-multi-commit) + the pre-RED‚ÜíRED / RED‚ÜíGREEN TDD gates. The whole XARCH-1 / shiny-module conversion campaign (Phases 1‚Äì9) is COMPLETE. Commits: 3db018d1 (refactor!: alias+orphans) ¬∑ 24992e0b (feat!: delete monolith) ¬∑ 53a9e5e0 (docs) ¬∑ a1618c48 (fix: pre-existing a2interactive vignette) + this docs: close-out. Status: Done. Pre-flight (mandatory before an irreversible delete): re-ran the ¬ß10 grep-inventory as a read-only multi-modal sweep + completeness critic (wf_48a6f152-f0f; inventoryConfirmed=true, 0 new refs, 0 broken claims); firsthand-verified system.file("application") is the SOLE live ref (R/runGenekeepr.R:19), inst/www/ (modular data-ready.js, appUI.R:9) ‚âÝ the deleted inst/application/www/, lifecycle is a dep, all 17 files tracked/git revert-able. NAMESPACE fallout (‚Üí Learning #35): deleting getMinParentAge.R (the SOLE carrier of @import shiny) dropped import(shiny) ‚Üí the modular UI lost h5; FIXED by relocating @import shiny to R/nprcgenekeepr-package.R ‚Äî caught by the regression run, NOT the inventory (a reference-grep can‚Äôt see what a file‚Äôs roxygen EMITS). RED = test_runGeneKeepR_alias.R (deprecation + delegation + port/launch.browser forwarding; mocks BOTH runModularApp and shiny::runApp so nothing launches) + test_monolith_removed.R (system.file("application")=="", paired into the deletion commit so each commit is green). Verify: non-e2e regression 2135 passed / 0 failed / 0 error (5 pre-existing modPyramid warnings, unchanged baseline); runtime smoke runGeneKeepR() ‚Üí modular app HTTP 200; devtools::check() = 0 errors / 0 warnings, creating vignettes ... OK (only pre-existing NOTEs: non-standard top-level dev files; a stale spelling.Rout.save baseline); grep shows no system.file("application"). Pre-existing fix (owner-approved, separate fix: commit): a2interactive.Rmd error-list table was missing the invalidIdChars description (NEW-45 drift: getEmptyErrorLst() has 10 fields vs 9 hardcoded) ‚Äî failed the vignette build, surfaced by the FULL check (prior sessions used only the regression-read and never ran full check). ‚áí SUGGESTED NEXT = pick an open GitHub issue (the conversion campaign is DONE ‚Äî there are no more phases). Natural continuation: #40 (strengthen the shinytest2 E2E behavioral assertions + harden the full-tier Chrome process-count flake ‚Äî the open Phase-8 follow-on). Others: #30 (lint debt: modSummaryStats=60 / modORIPReporting=17 / processQcStudbookResult=13), #34 (Integrate qcStudbook in modInput ‚Äî likely STALE: modInput already calls qcStudbook+runQcStudbook ‚Üí verify + close/relabel), #35/#36 (pedigree-filtering / chimp-pyramid enhancements), #37 (unused exports), #9/#38. ‚öÝ Two live-run CI watch items still ride on the first master run (see Phase-8 CI baked-in below): the renv lib-path / AppDriver-subprocess interaction, and the 23-in-one-process Chrome flake (stop_on_failure=TRUE). Orient + get direction first (FM #1/#9). Phase-8 CI baked-in (carried ‚Äî relevant if a future session touches .github/workflows/shinytest2.yaml or runs E2E in CI): the CI workflow is scheduled(0 7 * * *)+dispatch only (fires once it‚Äôs on master). It installs the package (R CMD INSTALL . ‚Äî the app subprocess does library(nprcgenekeepr) + create_test_app() uses system.file(package=)), sets NOT_CRAN:'true' (else skip_on_cran silently skips everything on CI ‚Äî the S32 blocker), NPRC_RUN_E2E:'true' + RENV_CONFIG_AUTOLOADER_ENABLED:'false' (else the renv autoloader makes R CMD INSTALL target renv‚Äôs PRIVATE lib, which the AppDriver subprocess ‚Äî starting in the installed shinytest/ dir, no project .Rprofile ‚Äî can‚Äôt see). It now runs ALL 23 E2E files via filter="^(app|e2e)-" (S34 broadened from 18; the run-step has stop_on_failure=TRUE + stop() if sum(passed)==0 silent-skip guard). ‚öÝ TWO LIVE-RUN WATCH ITEMS (never GitHub-verified ‚Äî both first exercise once the branch reaches master): (1) the renv lib-path / AppDriver-subprocess interaction ‚Äî confirm the app subprocess resolves library(nprcgenekeepr) on the first real run; (2) the 23-in-one-process Chrome flake (~1 transient error/5 local runs, ¬ß5(8c)/R2 dragon) ‚Äî under stop_on_failure=TRUE it can red the scheduled job; if a scheduled run reds, FIRST check whether it‚Äôs this flake (transient Chrome error, passes on re-run) vs a real regression; hardening (per-group fresh processes) is #40. To trigger: push add-methodology (or merge to master) then gh workflow run shinytest2.yaml. Full detail in CHANGELOG (S32/S33/S34) + Learnings #32/#33/#34. Phase-8a baked-in (carried ‚Äî relevant if a future session touches the E2E helpers / tests/testthat/helper-shinytest2.R): the 6 helpers + E2E_TIMEOUT <- 30000L are now defined there. navigate_to_menu_item was FINALIZED in 8d (S34) ‚Äî the ¬ß8.2 spike confirmed set_inputs(mainNavbar=<navbarMenu child>) reaches Settings/About/Help via read-back, so it stays a navigate_to_tab(app, item) delegate (docstring records this; a true visible-pane switch is an 8e/#40 gap, ¬ß8.3). Browser helpers are TDD‚Äôd browser-free via fake-AppDriver list() stubs (a list of functions; app$method(args) resolves $ on a list) ‚Äî test_helper_shinytest2.R has a throwing stub (proves *_safe‚Üí""/list()/FALSE, navigate_to_tab‚ÜíFALSE), a recording-ok stub (set_inputs‚Üíenv‚Üíget_value reflects ‚Üí navigate_to_tab read-back TRUE), and a silent-no-op stub (get_value never reflects ‚Üí navigate_to_tab FALSE, proving the read-back discriminates a failed nav). create_app_driver‚Äôs real construction needs Chrome ‚Üí existence+formals only in 8a (exercised in 8b). Full detail in CHANGELOG (S31) + Learning #31. Phase-7 baked-in (carried ‚Äî relevant only if a future session touches R/modInput.R): observeEvent(input$getData) branches if (identical(input$fileContent,"focalAnimals")) BEFORE readDataFile (~modInput.R:313-351) ‚Üí getFocalAnimalPed; nprcgenekeeprErr ‚Üí storedErrorLst() + cleaned NULL + early return; else fall through. 9 returned reactives UNCHANGED. To unit-test the focal path use local_mocked_bindings(getLkDirectRelatives=‚Ä¶, .package="nprcgenekeepr") (NOT mockery::stub). Full detail in CHANGELOG (S29) + Learning #29 + [testServer-mechanics]. ‚öÝ Learnings now live in PROJECT_LEARNINGS.md, NOT CLAUDE.md (extracted 2026-06-06 for the 40k CLAUDE.md limit; CLAUDE.md keeps only a pointer. Format unchanged since S28, for whoever next edits it): Learnings are #### Learning N ‚Äî title blocks (NOT table rows) + a ‚ÄúRecurring Reflexes (glossary)‚Äù section. When adding a Learning N+1: append a #### Learning N block to PROJECT_LEARNINGS.md, cite reflexes on a **Reflexes:** [tag][tag] line (every tag must be defined in the glossary), end with **Apply:** ‚Ä¶. If a NEW recurring reflex emerges, add a - **[tag]** (discovered #N) ‚Äî ‚Ä¶ glossary bullet. Verify before commit: every cited [tag] is defined (no dangling), no orphan glossary entry. See Learning #28 for the full no-loss method if re-condensing. Phase-5/6 baked-in (carried, only relevant if a future session touches R/modBreedingGroups.R): seed-group widget (curGrp1..N by LOCAL id), inert controls surfaced (minAge/nIterations/withKinship), breeding iter 1000‚Üí10, kmat/hasUnused in groupResults, Group Detail tab, length-clamp + length()>=1L observe guard, validate-and-block on phantom seeds. Full detail in CHANGELOG (S26/S27) + Learnings #26/#27. NEW-20 (carried, STILL APPLIES): R/makeGeneticDiversityDashboard.R is retained (won‚Äôt-delete; defines no live function). Do NOT delete. ‚öÝ Tracker reconciliation (carried): audit follow-ups (NEW-12/XARCH-3, XARCH-2..8) are NOT GitHub issues; live tracker is #1‚Äì#39. Now noted in BACKLOG.md ‚ÄúTracker reconciliation‚Äù. Decide with the user whether to file the remaining XARCH items. Key finding (carried from S21): the modular app is FAR more complete than TECH_DEBT_AUDIT_2026-05-30.md implied; plan against the real files, not the audit‚Äôs stale counts (plan ¬ß8/¬ß11).

Carried context (pre-S27)

All Phase-5 detail is in CHANGELOG.md (S26) and Learning #26; the lines below are retained S26 handoff context.

Task: Session 26 ‚Äî implement PHASE 5 of the Shiny-module conversion plan (Breeding Groups parity A: downloads + per-group kinship + group selector) is COMPLETE. All in R/modBreedingGroups.R: a new ‚ÄúGroup Detail‚Äù tab (additive ‚Äî the existing all-groups ‚ÄúGroups‚Äù + ‚ÄúStatistics‚Äù tabs are untouched) with a viewGrp selectInput, a per-group annotated member view (addSexAndAgeToGroup ‚Üí round(age,1) ‚Üí rename to ‚ÄúEgo ID‚Äù/‚ÄúSex‚Äù/‚ÄúAge in Years‚Äù ‚Üí order by Ego ID), a per-group kinship matrix view (filterKinMatrix(groupIds, kmat) ‚Üí round(.,6)), and downloadGroup (members CSV, na=""/row.names=FALSE) + downloadGroupKin (kinship CSV, na=""/row.names=TRUE) handlers. The module now stores the already-computed full kmat (+ a hasUnused flag) in groupResults so the kinship view derives each group‚Äôs submatrix WITHOUT re-deriving the matrix or touching formation. selectedGroup() clamps input$viewGrp via withinIntegerRange(.,1,length(breedingGroups())) (robust, both views); an observe populates the selector choices (‚ÄúGroup i‚Äù, last labelled ‚ÄúUnused‚Äù only when the unused group is non-empty). Commits: this session‚Äôs feat: impl (R/modBreedingGroups.R + tests/testthat/test_modBreedingGroups.R) + this docs: close-out. Status: Done under strict TDD (RED‚ÜíGREEN‚ÜíREFACTOR all gated + 3 pre-RED author-decision AskUserQuestions, all 3 ‚Üí recommended). 5 new tests in test_modBreedingGroups.R (UI structure; member download; kinship download + filterKinMatrix-equivalence; selector switches group; out-of-range clamp) ‚Äî all 5 RED at HEAD (Test 1 6/6 fail on absent UI; Tests 2-5 error on absent output$downloadGroup/downloadGroupKin), GREEN after. Full suite under pkgload::load_all+NOT_CRAN=true = 0 failed / 0 error, 0 non-e2e offenders, e2e skipped (156), 5 pre-existing modPyramid warnings, 2264 passed (modBreedingGroups file 50 tests 0/0/0). Dragon discharged: group-FORMATION byte-identical() across 3 seeds (nGroups 3/4/1) vs a pre-change HEAD reference (groups/score/unassigned/nGroups all identical) ‚Äî display/download only. Lint net-zero on R/modBreedingGroups.R (HEAD 31 = NOW 31 via touched-file stash; not .lintr line-excluded ‚Üí #7 trap N/A); document() zero man/NAMESPACE delta (no roxygen change; import(shiny) NAMESPACE:168 covers the new controls); Phase 3E runtime smoke ‚Äî runModularApp() binds + HTTP 200, the ‚ÄúGroup Detail‚Äù tab + breedingGroups-viewGrp + both download buttons render. No NEWS bullet ‚Äî modular app not canonical; display/download parity, no analytical-pipeline numeric change ‚Üí CHANGELOG only (consistent with S22/S23/S25). ‚áí SUGGESTED NEXT deliverable = implement PHASE 6 only (Breeding Groups parity B: seed-group pre-seeding + expose the inert controls ‚Äî add the monolith‚Äôs seed-animal ‚Äúcurrent groups‚Äù widget [getCurrentGroups/textAreaWidget, server.r:1019-1051] replacing the hardcoded currentGroups = list(character(0L)) in the groupAddAssign call; surface the controls the server READS but the UI never declares ‚Äî minAge/nIterations/withKinship at modBreedingGroups.R:187-189). ‚öÝ Breeding-sim iteration default = 10, NOT 1000: the monolith gpIter is value=10L (uitpBreedingGroupFormation.R:155-161) ‚Äî distinct from the GVA gene-drop iterations (1000); the modular fallback 1000L (modBreedingGroups.R:188) is a 100√ó drift ‚Üí set the breeding nIterations control default to 10. Risk MEDIUM. Read docs/planning/shiny-module-conversion-plan.md ¬ß9 Phase 6 first. Do NOT bundle phases. After Phase 6: 7/8/9 are üêâ (focal-animal/LabKey = Phase 7 owner-consult; E2E harness = issue #39 = Phase 8; monolith deletion = Phase 9). ‚öÝ Phase-5 changes now BAKED INTO R/modBreedingGroups.R (for future work): (1) groupResults now ALSO stores kmat (the full kinship matrix from getKinshipMatrix) and hasUnused (was the appended unused-animals group non-empty) ‚Äî the 5 RETURNED reactives (groups/nGroups/score/unassigned/groupKinship) are UNCHANGED, and result$groupKin is still NULL (withKin defaults FALSE ‚Äî no withKinship UI control until Phase 6). (2) Per-group kinship is computed from the stored kmat via filterKinMatrix(groupIds, kmat), NOT from result$groupKin ‚Äî byte-identical to the monolith‚Äôs groupKin[[i]] because each group‚Äôs members ‚äÜ candidates (so filtering the full vs candidate-reduced kmat yields the same submatrix). This makes the kinship view independent of the Phase-6 withKinship control. (3) The selector/views/downloads live in a new ‚ÄúGroup Detail‚Äù tab; the existing all-groups ‚ÄúGroups‚Äù tab is untouched. (4) selectedGroup() clamps to length(breedingGroups()) (more robust than the monolith, which clamps the member view to input$numGp and does NOT clamp the kinship view at all ‚Äî Learning #26 / #25c). (5) The selector-populating observe guards on length(breedingGroups()) >= 1L, NOT req(breedingGroups()) ‚Äî an empty result is a zero-length list(), which req()/isTruthy() treats as TRUE, so the naive guard fired updateSelectInput with empty choices + selected=1L and emitted a warning on the degenerate harem-with-no-eligible-sires case (groups()=‚àÖ). (6) addSexAndAgeToGroup (member view) needs ped$birth (‚Üí getCurrentAge) ‚Äî production cleaned studbooks always carry it; synthetic test peds must include birth. (7) addSexAndAgeToGroup/filterKinMatrix/getDatedFilename/withinIntegerRange are all @exported same-package fns and the new shiny controls are covered by import(shiny) ‚Üí no @importFrom/NAMESPACE change. Key finding (carried from S21, reframes the audit): the modular app is FAR more complete than TECH_DEBT_AUDIT_2026-05-30.md implied; the audit‚Äôs ‚Äúdo XARCH-3/4/7 before XARCH-1‚Äù sequencing is MOOT (plan ¬ß8). Plan against the real files, not the audit‚Äôs stale counts (plan ¬ß11). NEW-20 (carried, STILL APPLIES): R/makeGeneticDiversityDashboard.R is retained (won‚Äôt-delete; defines no live function). Its only consumer getProportionLow stays dead. Do NOT delete. ‚öÝ Still-open tracker reconciliation (carried S10/S11/S21): audit follow-ups (NEW-12/XARCH-3, XARCH-2..8 in BACKLOG.md/audit) are NOT GitHub issues; live tracker is #1‚Äì#39. The conversion plan resolves #27/XARCH-1, subsumes #39 (Phase 8), and makes #34 stale (modInput already integrates qcStudbook ‚Äî plan ¬ß11). Decide with user whether to file the remaining XARCH items or keep in BACKLOG. Prior phases: Phase 1 (Summary Statistics tab parity) ‚úÖ S22 596f6bc9. The audit compute/test campaign (Sessions 1‚Äì20) is fully resolved (CHANGELOG.md). The S20-detail line and ‚ÄúPrior code campaign‚Äù list below are retained as historical context. Status: Done under strict TDD as REFACTOR-only (no RED/GREEN ‚Äî author-classified via AskUserQuestion; gated PRE-RED‚ÜíREFACTOR). Defect (found Session 4, never fixed): the test ‚Äúworks with records with no potential parent‚Äù pushed BRI2MW‚Äôs birth to 1950 into a local ped but then asserted the old top-level potentialParents[[1L]]$id from the unmodified fixture ‚Äî a copy/paste tautology already covered by the first test that never inspected ped and verified nothing about its named scenario. Fix: replaced it with a discriminating assertion. BRI2MW is a from-center founder with both parents unknown that normally appears in the output; at birth=1950 its breeding-age candidate set is empty, so getPotentialParents correctly DROPS it (result 50‚Üí49). New assertions: BRI2MW present in the unmodified fixture (precondition), absent from the scenario result, and result length = global‚àí1. Why REFACTOR-only: production is already correct ‚Üí a correct assertion is green-on-arrival; declaring RED would violate ‚ÄúRED tests must fail,‚Äù and a forced-fail would be a synthetic RED (Learning #18c). Rigor via MUTATION CHECK: disabling the next-skip in-place (perl -i ‚Üí git checkout restore, per Learning #3) makes BOTH new assertions FAIL ‚Äî and the OLD vacuous assertion would have PASSED that same mutant, which is the proof the fix added real coverage. Verification: full suite under load_all+NOT_CRAN=true = 0 failed / 0 error, 0 non-e2e offenders, 2049 passed (+2 vs S19), 5 pre-existing modPyramid warnings, e2e files skipped. Lint net-zero (tests is .lintr-excluded ‚Üí exempt by config). No production change ‚Üí no document(), no NEWS.md bullet (internal/test-only). Commit: 6049445d (test) + this docs: close-out. Learning #20. NEW-20 (carried, STILL APPLIES): R/makeGeneticDiversityDashboard.R is retained (won‚Äôt-delete; .Rbuildignore‚Äôd L25, defines no live function). Its only consumer getProportionLow stays dead. Do NOT delete. Suggested next is at the TOP of this block (Phase 3). The audit compute/test campaign (S1‚Äì20) is fully resolved and the Shiny conversion is implemented through Phase 2; what remains is plan Phases 3‚Äì9 (see plan ¬ß9) + open GitHub issues (#34 bug [stale ‚Äî modInput already integrates qcStudbook]; #30 lintr debt: modSummaryStats=60, modORIPReporting=17, processQcStudbookResult=13; #37 unused exports; #9 animals missing one parent; #35/#36 enhancements). The ‚ÄúRemaining work + audit-fix guidance‚Äù section below is historical audit-campaign context (all NEW-* resolved). ‚öÝ Still-open tracker reconciliation (carried from S10/S11): the audit follow-ups (NEW-12/XARCH-3, ‚Ä¶ in BACKLOG.md) are NOT GitHub issues; the live tracker is #1‚Äì#39. Decide with the user whether to file them or keep them in BACKLOG. They coexist. (Issue #30 lintr ‚Äî pre-existing lint debt: modSummaryStats.R=60, modORIPReporting.R=17, processQcStudbookResult.R=13.)
